
1.1(1): spyi rgyud chen po nam mkha' dkar po ye khri mtha' 
1.2(1): sel gyi rgyud las mkha' 'gro rin chen phreng ba 
1.3(1): gsang sngags phyi nang 'byed pa'i bam po 
1.4(1): bzhugs so/ /
1.5(1): @#/  /rgya gar skad du/ bid ta bo d+hi sa twa: DAki ni/ sarba tsi t+ta/ bud+hasarba 
1.6(1): a ni radz+nyAn/ DAki rat+na mAl tan+tA rA dza/ bod skad du rig pa byang chub kyi sems/
1.7(1): mkha' 'gro ma thams cad kyi thugs/ sangs rgyas thams cad kyi yang dag pa'i ye 
1.8(1): shes/ mkha' 'gro rin chen phreng ba'i rgyud kyi rgyal po zhes bya ba/ kun skyed mkha' 'gro 
1.9(1): dbyings kyi yum lnga la phyag 'tshal lo/ /
1.10(1): 7 'di skad bdag gis thos pa'i dus gcig na/ dbyings kyi mkha' 'gro kun tu 
1.11(1): bzang mo dang / ye shes kyi mkha' 'gro yum rnam pa lnga dang / sprul pa las kyi mkha' 
1.12(1): 'gro rnams dang / dregs 'dul sha zan gyi mkha' 'gro ma rnams dang / thugs sras 
1.13(1): byin rlabs kyi 'khor dang / ye shes nyid las mi zhan pa'i 'khor dang / sprul pa las 
1.14(1): kyi 'khor dang / stobs 'dul thabs kyi 'khor dang / dbang med dad pas 'dus 
1.15(1): pa'i 'khor dang / log lta bdud dang ru tra srin po'i tshogs dang / las kyis 'brel 
1.16(1): zhing bstan pas bsdus pa'i 'khor dang / 'gro ba rigs drug bar do'i sems can 
2.1(1): rnams dang / thams cad dang ldan pa'i 'khor de dag dang thabs cig tu bzhugs 
2.2(1): so/ /
2.3(1): de'i tshe de'i dus na/ sna tshogs thabs dang shes rab rnams/ thams cad sdud 
2.4(1): par byed pa yi/ rig pa sems kyi rol pa las/ ma bskyod dam tshig mkha' 'gro 
2.5(1): mas/ dbyings kyi mkha' 'gro'i spyan snga ru/ gser g.yu rin chen las sogs dang /
2.6(1): dar zab longs spyod las sogs te/ 'dus byas mchod pa sna tshogs dang / phyi nang 
2.7(1): gsang ba las sogs te/ mchod pa'i bye brag sna tshogs phul/ skor ba lha phyag stong 
2.8(1): du btsal/ pus btsugs thal sbyar gus btud de/ mdangs phyung snyan pa'i dbyangs 
2.9(1): kyis zhus/ kyai ho dbyings nyid dag pa'i klong / kun gsal ye shes 'od kyi sku/ sna 
2.10(1): tshogs rol pa shar ba'i dpal/ snang srid ma 'gag gsal ba'i 'od/ thams cad 
2.11(1): dbyings su bsdus pa'i yum/ kun mkhyen kun gzigs thugs klong nas/ 'das 
2.12(1): dang ma 'ongs da ltar gyi/ khams gsum srid gsum sems can rnams/ thugs 
2.13(1): rjes bzung ba'i dus la bab/ las can drang ba'i dus la bab/ log lta 'dul ba'i 
2.14(1): dus la bab/ sngon byung da ltar ma 'ongs pa'i/ rigs can gshen rabs mos pa 
2.15(1): can/ don rgyud smin par mdzad du gsol/ gdung ba'i stobs kyis lus 'bul na/
2.16(1): lus ngag byin gyis brlab tu gsol/ 'khrul snang dbyings su bsgral du gsol/ zhes 
2.17(1): mkha' 'gro rin chen phreng ba'i rgyud las/ gleng gzhi'i gleng bslang gi le'u ste dang 
2.18(1): po'o// //
2.19(1): 7 de skad ces gsol pas gsan nas kyang / nam mkha'i klong nas nyi shar ltar/
2.20(1): dbyings kyi klong nas rig pa shar/ rdzogs sku ye shes mkha' 'gro ma/ nam mkha' 
2.21(1): dbyings kyi rgyal mo yis/ don la g.yo bskyod mi mnga' yang / las dag gdul bya'i 
3.1(1): snang ba la/ kun 'dus rol pa'i don gsungs so/ /legs so skal ldan rigs kyi 
3.2(1): tshogs/ gdul bya rnam pa gnyis don du/ 'jug sgo lam dang sbyor sgo theg /bsrung 
3.3(1): sgo dam tshig bsgrod sgo dbang / spyad sgo phrin las dgrol sgo sems/ sbyor sgrol sngags 
3.4(1): dang ting 'dzin dang / sgra rig mtshan nyid rnam bkod dang / gson gshin tshe 
3.5(1): dbang gnas las sogs/ rin po che yi bang mdzod dam/ skyu ru ra yi rnam pa ltar/
3.6(1): kun 'byung gsal la ma 'dres par/ dgos 'dod kun gyi re ba bskang / 'khor 
3.7(1): 'dus rtse gcig yid kyis nyon/ kun 'dus rol pa'i phrin las kyis/ thams cad 
3.8(1): dbyings su bsgral bar bya/ bsrungs dang gsad dang gso dang gzer/ dbab dang 
3.9(1): gcod dang bsreg dang bsgral/ lha rgyal tshangs pa'i 'phrul khug ltar/ 'dod dgu 
3.10(1): 'byung ba'i sa lam gyis/ 'khor tshogs dbugs dbyung sa lam spar/ don ldan yon 
3.11(1): tan bsam mi khyab/ mi ldan snying khrag kha ru lhugs/ mthar yang na rag dmyal 
3.12(1): khams bsreg /ces rin po che rnam par spel ba'i ting nge 'dzin zhes bya ba la snyoms 
3.13(1): par zhugs pas/ snang srid khams rnams thams cad kun/ 'ur ro 'ur ro rab tu 
3.14(1): 'ur/ thug go thug go rab tu thug /chem mo chem mo rab tu chem/ ldeg go ldeg go rab 
3.15(1): tu ldeg /'gul lo 'gul lo rab tu 'gul/ mer ro mer ro rab tu mer/ dir ro 
3.16(1): dir ro rab tu dir/ g.yo 'o g.yo 'o rab tu g.yo/ 'jig rten khams kun g.yo ldeg 
3.17(1): 'gul/ snang srid thams cad bon sgra bsgrags/ ging chen pho mo bzhad yal yal/
3.18(1): mkha' 'gro'i gsung sgra 'brug ltar bsgrags/ bon nyid stong sgra thog ltar chems/
3.19(1): log lta'i tshogs rnams 'dar shig shig /ces dris lan dang po bshad gzhi rtsa ba'i 
3.20(1): le'u ste gnyis pa'o// //
3.21(1): 7 ye shes mkha' 'gros bka' bstsal pa/ dam tshig mkha' 'gro las sogs te/
4.1(1): phun sum 'tshogs pa'i 'khor rnams kun/ rtse gcig pa yi yid kyis nyon/ phyi rabs 
4.2(1): rigs ldan mos pa can/ thar pa chen por bgrod pa'i phyir/ sgrub pa gnas kyi mtshan 
4.3(1): nyid bstan/ zhi rgyas dbang dang mngon spyod sogs/ dngos grub myur phyir gsal 
4.4(1): bar bstan/ dang po gnas bstan 'di lta ste/ shar bltas ri brag dkar la zlum/
4.5(1): sa chu 'jam zhing rtsi shing 'khrungs/ gdugs snga nub ri skyob la btsan/ gnyis pa lho 
4.6(1): dang shar lhor bltas/ sa dbyibs snum la rtsi shing phyug /me tog 'khrungs shing phyugs 
4.7(1): ma skyong / 'bru bcud smin zhing 'dod pa tshang / gsum pa lho shar byang nub ste/ sa 
4.8(1): dbyibs ri brag dkar dmar la/ shin tu skyob cing btsan pa'i sa/ me tog dmar 
4.9(1): po 'khrungs pa dang / bon gyi bstan pa dar sa dang / bud med rigs mang 'dus 
4.10(1): sa shis/ bzhi pa byang bltas ri rong gnag /rtsub la gzar zhing nags tshal 'thibs/
4.11(1): dur khrod 'tshogs shing gcan spyang rgyu/ mtshon pa phyi yi gnas su bstan/ 'dzin byed 
4.12(1): nang gi gnas bstan pa/ mkhyen ldan mkhas btsun 'tshogs pa'i sa/ dam ldan rang 
4.13(1): rgyud zhi ba'i sa/ bdag 'dzin yul snang spangs ba'i sa/ zhi ba nang gi gnas su shis/
4.14(1): sgrub gshen bstan pa dar ba'i sa/ zas nor longs spyod 'tshogs pa'i sa/ khang khyim 
4.15(1): dga' zhing nyams bde'i sa/ grogs mched brtse gdung che ba'i sa/ rgyas pa nang gi 
4.16(1): gnas su shis/ rigs mang khrom tshogs 'du ba'i sa/ rigs ma'i btsal khungs mod 
4.17(1): pa'i sa/ 'jig rten rtog pa rgyas pa'i sa/ dbang sbyor nang gi gnas su shis/ mthu 
4.18(1): ldan dregs pa 'dren pa'i sa/ rtsub khro zhe sdang ldang pa'i sa/ 'dre srin rkan sgra sgrogs 
4.19(1): pa'i sa/ rang rgyud khro gtum 'byung ba'i sa/ drag po nang gi gnas su shis/ gsang 
4.20(1): ba'i gnas ni gcig tu bstan/ rgyud nyid rtog pa sna tshogs pa/ rjes 'jug yid 
4.21(1): la ltoms (ldog)pa'i sa/ 'phrin las rnam bzhi rdzogs pa'i sa/ rig pa rang dbang 
5.1(1): 'bar sa de/ gsang ba'i gnas kyi mtshan nyid yin/ zhes mkha' 'gro rin chen 
5.2(1): phreng ba'i rgyud las/ gang zhig sgrub gnas kyi mtshan nyid bstan pa'i le'u ste gsum 
5.3(1): pa'o// //
5.4(1): 7 ye shes mkha' 'gros bka' bstsal pa/ dam tshig mkha' 'gro las sogs te/
5.5(1): phun sum 'tshogs pa'i 'khor rnams kun/ rtse gcig pa yi yid kyis nyon/ lung dang 
5.6(1): ldan pa'i gnas dag tu/ sngon 'gro tshogs gsog dkyil 'khor nas/ mdo rgyud pang 
5.7(1): kong tsha tsha dang / mchod gtor cha gsum las sogs te/ mchod sbyin lan chags 
5.8(1): sna tshogs gzhal/ sa bslang gdon bgegs las sogs bskrad/ gzungs sgrub phyi yi 
5.9(1): mchod pa bshams/ lung ldan gshen rabs dgongs ldan gyis/ ting 'dzin dgongs 
5.10(1): pa'i las la 'jug /rjes 'jug dpa' bo stobs ldan gyis/ phyi nang zhi khro'i bsnyen pa 
5.11(1): bsrang / g.yung drung las mkhan kun rgyu yis/ mchod pa'i gral khrigs legs par 
5.12(1): spel/ g.yung drung so pas rtog sgrib brtag /g.yung drung gtum pos bar chod bsal/
5.13(1): g.yung drung sems dpa' las la 'jug /g.yung drung pho nyas yo byad spel/ g.yung 
5.14(1): drung bya rog dngos grub rol/ longs spyod rnam pa bzhir bgos la/ cha gcig bla 
5.15(1): ma'i mchod par bsham/ cha gcig tshogs dang mchod par bsham/ cha gcig sems 
5.16(1): dpa' pho mos rol/ cha gcig phyi rol tshogs sogs bya/ de nas mtshams la 'jug 
5.17(1): pa ni/ phyi nang gsang ba gsum du shes/ phyi mtshams tho bzhi rgyal por bskyed/ nang 
5.18(1): mtshams dam sri pho mo mnan/ gsang mtshams me ri mtshon cha dang / khro rgyal yab 
5.19(1): yum gsal bar bskyed/ mtshams kyi ngo bo nges tshig dang / dbye ba 'bras bu dgos 
5.20(1): pa lnga/ mtshams kyi ngo bo ma 'dres pa/ mtshams kyi nges tshig mi 'phyugs pa/ dbye 
5.21(1): ba gsum la tri tri dgu/ tho bzhi'i snying po phyi yi phyi/ rgyal chen sku gsal phyi yi nang /
6.1(1): rig pa sdud shes gsang ba'o/ /mi 'da' srog snying nang gi phyi/ yul la sbyor shes nang 
6.2(1): gi nang / rang gdangs gsal ba gsang ba'o/ /me ri mtshon khro gsang ba'i phyi/ 'phro 
6.3(1): 'du thogs med gsang ba'i nang / rang las ma g.yos gsang ba'o/ /mtshams kyi 
6.4(1): dgos pa'i don rtags gnyis/ don ni bder gshegs sku lnga'o/ /rtags ni rang chas 
6.5(1): dug lnga'o/ /don rtags ngo sprod gcod thabs ni/ don ni dbus phyogs g.yung drung lha/
6.6(1): rtags ni nyon mongs gti mug 'dres/ mtshams ni stong nyid ye shes gcad/ don ni 
6.7(1): shar phyogs bder gshegs lha/ rtags ni nyon mongs zhe sdang 'dres/ 'dres mtshams 
6.8(1): me long ye shes gcad/ don ni lho phyogs rin chen lha/ rtags ni nyon mongs nga rgyal 
6.9(1): 'dres/ 'dres mtshams mnyam nyid ye shes gcad/ don ni nub phyogs pad ma'i 
6.10(1): lha/ rtags ni nyon mongs 'dod chags 'dres/ 'dres mtshams kun rtogs ye shes 
6.11(1): gcad/ don ni byang phyogs phrin las lha/ rtags ni nyon mongs 'phrag dog 'dres/
6.12(1): 'dres mtshams bya grub ye shes gcad/ 'bras bu 'khrul snang go phyes nas/ phung po 
6.13(1): rnam lnga lha lnga gyur/ ye shes rnam lnga rang la 'bar/ dug lnga ma spangs dngos grub 
6.14(1): shar/ thams cad rang byung dbyings su chod/ ces mkha' 'gro rin chen phreng ba'i 
6.15(1): rgyud las/ sngon du 'gro ba'i cho ga dang / mtshams kyi gcod thabs bstan pa'i le'u 
6.16(1): ste bzhi pa'o// //
6.17(1): 7 ye shes mkha' 'gros bka' bstsal pa/ dam tshig mkha' 'gro las sogs 
6.18(1): te/ phun sum 'tshogs pa'i 'khor rnams kun/ rtse gcig pa yi yid kyis nyon/ rjes 
6.19(1): 'jug las sogs sems can rnams/ bskal bsags sgrib pa sbyang ba'i phyir/
6.20(1): bshags pa'i don nyid dgrol te bstan/ ngo bo nges tshig dbye ba dang / dpang po 
6.21(1): bshags thabs dgos pa bstan/ bshags pa'i ngo bo 'khrul ba'i sems/ nges tshig 
7.1(1): 'gyod bshags sdom pa'o/ /dbye ba rnam pa lnga yin te/ yang dag don gyi bshags 
7.2(1): pa ni/ 'khrul med rig pa'i don rtogs pas/ bshags yul gshog mkhan dbyer mi 
7.3(1): phyed/ spros med don gyi bshags pa yin/ sdig lus sbyong byed bshags pa ni/ bdag 
7.4(1): nyid lha yi nga rgyal gsal/ shangs bug g.yas nas bdag gi lus/ bton nas pus 
7.5(1): btsugs bshags pa 'bul/ bag chags lus sbyong bshags pa yin/ gshen rabs 
7.6(1): mos dbang bshags pa ni/ yi dam mkha' 'gro bla ma rnams/ bon gyi dbyings nas 
7.7(1): spyan drangs nas/ mdun gyi bar snang ci rigs su/ gdan rgyan steng na bzhugs 
7.8(1): bsams nas/ tha mal lus kyis mos shing bshags/ gshen rabs mos dbang 
7.9(1): bshags pa'o/ /'jur byed thabs kyi bshags pa ni/ phrin las phyi nang gang zhugs 
7.10(1): kyang / gyer bskul snying po ngag gi bshags/ lha bsgoms sku gdung bzhengs pa rnams/
7.11(1): gnyen rabs lus kyi bshags pa yin/ yid ni mi g.yo don dang ldan/ mi 'phyugs 
7.12(1): yid kyi bshags pa yin/ kun gsal 'phrul gyi bshags pa ni/ bdag nyid lus 
7.13(1): ngag yid gsum ni/ bla ma don ldan thabs kyis zin/ cir spyod cir sgrog cir myong 
7.14(1): yang / yang dag dbyings las ma g.yos shing / ldang nyal lha phyag 'gro 'dug skor/
7.15(1): zas skom tshogs la spyod lam lha/ cir snang 'phrul du bsgyur shes pa'o/ /dbang po 
7.16(1): yul gyi snang ba ni/ theg pa dgu ltar rang rang gi/ lha dang bla ma slob dpon sogs/
7.17(1): lta ba mtho dman don phyes nas/ rang rang yul snang dbang por bzung / phrin las 
7.18(1): rab 'bring blo yis bshags/ bshags thabs chag nyams che chung gis/ dka' sla 
7.19(1): gzhan ltar shes par bya/ bshags shing sbyangs pa'i dgos pa ni/ lus ngag yid kyi 
7.20(1): rnam pa dag /sku gsung thugs su ldan pa'o/ /zhes mkha' 'gro rin chen phreng ba'i 
7.21(1): rgyud las/ bshags pa'i don bstan pa'i le'u ste lnga pa'o//
8.1(1): 7 ye shes mkha' 'gros bka' bstsal pa/ dam tshig mkha' 'gro las sogs te/
8.2(1): phun sum 'tshogs pa'i 'khor rnams kun/ rtse gcig pa yi yid kyis nyon/ sgrub pa phyi 
8.3(1): nang gang byed kyang / rgyu rtog nyon mongs ma zad pas/ phyi nang gsang ba'i bgegs 
8.4(1): rnams kyis/ mchog dang thun mong bar chod byed/ de nyid sngags kyis bsrung bar 
8.5(1): bya/ A+o~M A+o~M A+o~M/ hU~M hUM hUM/ bswo bswo bswo/ I I/ badz+ra badz+ra/ yak+Sha yak+Sha/ rak+Sha rak+Sha/ ki 
8.6(1): la yA ki la yA/ khro ta khro ta/ ma ha ma ha/ sarba sarba/ ma ra na ma ra na/ ta ka ta ka/
8.7(1): tsan d+ha tsan d+ha/ ma ra ya ma ra ya/ gnod byed r+ts+ri tri ma nu myog myog /trig trig /ha 
8.8(1): ra ya ha ra ya/ hu ru hu ru/ ma ra ya ma ra ya/ lhan lhan/ ha ra ha ra/ da ha da ha/
8.9(1): pa tsa pa tsa/ ha na ha na/ myag myag /myog myog /thum thum/ ril ril/ rbad rbad/
8.10(1): kham kham/ khug khug /dza dza/ ru tra ru tra/ khram thun khram thun/ kha khram kha khram/ tsi 
8.11(1): ta tsi ta/ rbad rbad na ga ra tsa na ga ra tsa/ thum thum/ phu ya phu ya zung chings rbad/
8.12(1): yag mo rag mo srog la rol rol/ rtsa la myag myag /ra tsa tsa tri/ rgyug rgyug snying la 
8.13(1): rgyug rgyug /cho cho bla la cho cho/ a ti pa ta dza dza/ dun dun dza la dza la/ ram ram/
8.14(1): 'ur 'ur/ du tri du tri/ yal yal A 'gu sha ma ra ya khug drongs dza dza/ thum ri li 
8.15(1): li ma ra ya phaT/ yang gsang sngags kyi rgyal po 'dir/ gang zhugs bar chad kun 
8.16(1): gsal te/ nyungs kar dag la bzlas byas la/ bum pa'i bgegs rnams bskrad par 
8.17(1): bya/ rma bya'i sgro yis byab bya zhing / dbang bskur gang zag bgegs rnams bskrad/
8.18(1): khrag sna dag la bzlas byas la/ sbyin sreg dus kyi bgegs rnams bskrad/ ske tse dag 
8.19(1): la bzlas byas la/ mtshams dang dkyil 'khor bgegs rnams bskrad/ phud dang 
8.20(1): rag ta gtor bya zhing / tshogs dang mchod pa'i bgegs rnams bskrad/ bye rgod dag 
8.21(1): la bzlas byas la/ tshe 'das mtshan byang bgegs rnams bskrad/ phur pa dag la 
9.1(1): bzlas byas la/ bdud rtsi pho brang bgegs rnams bskrad/ 'bru snying nas la bzlas 
9.2(1): byas la/ rab gnas rten gyi bgegs rnams bskrad/ de bzhin tshe dbang bkra shis 
9.3(1): so/ /bar chad srung ba kun gyi gtso/ las rnams kun gyi sngon 'gro yin/ mkha' 'gro 
9.4(1): kun gyi yang bcud yin/ zhes mkha' 'gro rin chen phreng ba'i rgyud las/ bar chad 
9.5(1): srung ba'i le'u ste drug pa'o/ /sngon 'gro cho ga'i skabs so// //
9.6(1): 7 ye shes mkha' 'gros bka' bstsal pa/ dam tshig mkha' 'gro las sogs 
9.7(1): te/ phun sum 'tshogs pa'i 'khor rnams kun/ rtse gcig pa yi yid kyis nyon/ snang 
9.8(1): srid 'khor 'das thams cad kun/ mi 'bral dbyings su dgrol ba'i phyir/ dkyil 
9.9(1): 'khor mtshan nyid bstan par bya/ ngo bo rig pa'i sems dkyil du/ khams gsum 
9.10(1): srid gsum kun 'khor bas/ mi 'phyug ngo bo shes par bya/ nges tshig tshom bu nyi 
9.11(1): shu lnga/ sna tshogs bskor zhing dkyil du 'khor/ gcig dkyil 'khor bas nges 
9.12(1): pa'o/ /dbye na rnam pa gsum yin te/ phyi dang nang dang gsang ba'o/ /gtan 
9.13(1): la gang gis 'bebs she na/ don dang rtags dang mtshon pa'o/ /phyi yi dkyil 
9.14(1): 'khor rnam pa dgu/ snang ldan pad ma brgyad pa ni/ mtshan nyid khrims shor 
9.15(1): bshags par gces/ 'od gsal zla gam kha sprod ni/ phyi mchod rnam lnga'i don 
9.16(1): la gces/ me long dgu 'dus dkyil 'khor ni/ theg dgu'i klong bshags don 
9.17(1): la gces/ rnam dag yum gyi dkyil 'khor ni/ gsas khang gsung rab mchod 
9.18(1): rten sogs/ rab gnas rgyas pa'i dus su gces/ pad ma stong brtsegs dkyil 
9.19(1): 'khor ni/ sku gdung glud 'bags bshags par gces/ hon dong dgu sbyong 
9.20(1): dkyil 'khor ni/ tshe 'das ro bsreg dus su gces/ sgrol byed bzhi 'dus dkyil 
9.21(1): 'khor ni/ mched lcam nyams chags bskang phyir gces/ bdud 'dul 'khros 
10.1(1): pa'i dkyil 'khor ni/ phyi yi bar chad bsal phyir gces/ rin chen 'bar ba'i 
10.2(1): dkyil 'khor ni/ zas nor longs spyod 'du phyir gces/ nang gi dkyil 'khor 
10.3(1): rnam pa gsum/ zhi dang khro bo kha tshar gsum/ spros pas gang rung gcig la bcu/
10.4(1): sngon 'gro tshogs sog dkyil 'khor dang / rang nyid lha yi dkyil 'khor dang /
10.5(1): 'bar ba mtshams kyi dkyil 'khor dang / sgrib sbyong bshags pa'i dkyil 'khor 
10.6(1): dang / byin rlabs dbang gi dkyil 'khor dang / bskyed pa ting 'dzin dkyil 
10.7(1): 'khor dang / spyan drang bzhugs gsol dkyil 'khor dang / phyi nang mchod pa'i 
10.8(1): dkyil 'khor dang / 'dzab dang bstod ra'i dkyil 'khor dang / lhag ma 'jug 
10.9(1): sdud dkyil 'khor ro/ /gsang ba'i dal la rnam pa drug /mtshan ma rdul tshon dkyil 
10.10(1): 'khor dang / mkha' dbyings (bum pa )yum gyi dkyil 'khor dang / bskyed pa lha 
10.11(1): yi dkyil 'khor dang / 'phro 'du sngags kyi dkyil 'khor dang / lhag pa ting 'dzin 
10.12(1): dkyil 'khor dang / kun grol lta ba'i dkyil 'khor ro/ /phrin las rnam bzhi gang 
10.13(1): rung la/ dkyil 'khor bcu drug don de sbyar/ yang gsang dkyil 'khor rnam pa 
10.14(1): gnyis/ rang rgyud 'khor lo'i dkyil 'khor dang / rtsa rlung zung 'jug dkyil 'khor 
10.15(1): ro/ /dkyil 'khor nyi shu rtsa bdun gyis/ dad ldan dbugs 'byin sgrol bar byed/
10.16(1): ces mkha' 'gro rin chen phreng ba'i rgyud las/ dkyil 'khor mdor bstan pa'i le'u 
10.17(1): ste bdun pa'o/ //
10.18(1): 7 ye shes mkha' 'gros bka' bstsal pa/ dam tshig mkha' 'gro las sogs 
10.19(1): te/ phun sum 'tshogs pa'i 'khor rnams kun/ rtse gcig pa yi yid kyis nyon/ phrin 
10.20(1): las rim pa rnam bzhi las kyang / dkyil 'khor rnam pa mang yod kyang / spor byed 
10.21(1): dbang gi dkyil 'khor la/ don gyi rim pa rnam pa bzhi/ mtshan ma sa la bri ba'i 
11.1(1): dal/ gsang ldan rol pa'i dkyil 'khor dang / rang lus phyag rgyar sgyur ba'i dal/
11.2(1): 'khor lo rnam drug dkyil 'khor dang / dngos grub byin rlabs brtan pa'i dal/
11.3(1): brten thabs rigs ma'i dkyil 'khor dang / rig pa rtsal dbang rgyas pa'i dal/ ngo 
11.4(1): sprod rtsa 'dab dkyil 'khor ro/ /rdul tshon la brten yang dag don/ rang ngo sprad 
11.5(1): phyir bzhengs thabs bstan/ gsang sngags gzhan nas 'byung bzhin du/ sa chog 
11.6(1): sbyang dang bgegs bskrad rnams/ tshul ldan shes par bya ba yin/ yang khyad phyug 
11.7(1): po grangs bdun gyi/ zhing khang rten sa shis par bshad/ sman spos dri yis chag chag 
11.8(1): gdab/ mchog tu tsan dan rnam gnyis dang / dza ti ga pur gser mdog dang / rgya 
11.9(1): spos brag spos rab tu shis/ khru 'dom tshad dang ldan par bsham/ gzhung ltar thig 
11.10(1): gdab 'bri thabs ni/ dbus nas thig skor rim pa drug /rtse sor rnam bdun dang 
11.11(1): po gnyis/ mthing ka dkar ser dmar ljang sngo/ rgyu drug sbyang zhing rigs drug 'dren/
11.12(1): gzhi las ye shes lnga shar rtags/ phyi skor rim gcig pad ma'i gdan/ lha snam thig 
11.13(1): gi cha dang bstun/ pad ma 'dab ma (phyogs )bcu gnyis pa/ dkar gsum sngo gsum 
11.14(1): dmar gsum ljang / gang mdzes mdangs su gtod byas la/ gong ras mi 'gyur 
11.15(1): gser gyis bris/ brgyad pa rim bskor g.yung drung cha/ mi 'gyur mthing nag tshon 
11.16(1): gyis 'gengs/ gru chad rang tshon mthing gas gcod/ bar gyi lha rnams spyi dang bstun/
11.17(1): sgo bzhi rtseg pa tshul ltar shis/ 'dod yon pha gu drwa phyed sogs/ tshul ltar rgyan 
11.18(1): rnams khol mas gdab/ phyi rim g.yung drung ra ba dang / rin chen me ris bskor 
11.19(1): ba'o/ /zhes mkha' 'gro rin chen phreng ba'i rgyud las/ rdul tshon gyi dkyil 'khor bri 
11.20(1): thabs bstan pa'i le'u ste brgyad pa'o/ //
11.21(1): 7 ye shes mkha' 'gros bka' bstsal pa/ dam tshig mkha' 'gro las sogs 
12.1(1): te/ phun sum 'tshogs pa'i 'khor rnams kun/ rtse gcig pa yi yid kyis nyon/ rjes 
12.2(1): 'jug gshen rabs las 'phro can/ bag chags shes rgyud sbyang pa dang / phung po 
12.3(1): lnga dang nyon mongs sogs/ mi 'bral phyag rgyar sgyur ba'i phyir/ phyag rgya'i lha tshogs 
12.4(1): dgod pa ni/ dbus su rnam shes grol ba'i lha/ kun tu bzang po yab yum dgod/
12.5(1): mthing ka zhal gcig phyag gnyis pa/ mnyam bzhag phyag rgya g.yung drung 'khyil/ yum 
12.6(1): 'khyud g.yon na bum pa stob/ seng khri nyi zla pad ma'i gdan/ shar phyogs dbus kyi 
12.7(1): pad ma la/ gzugs kyi phung po dag pa'i lha/ brtan pa kun skyed sku mdog dkar/
12.8(1): g.yas na bon gyi 'khor lo bskor// yum chen mi g.yo brtan ma ni/ g.yas 'khyud 
12.9(1): g.yon pas bum pa 'dzin/ yum gyi phyag mtshan kun la mthun/ glang chen nyi zla pad 
12.10(1): ma'i gdan/ lho phyogs dbus kyi pad ma la/ tshor ba'i phung po dag pa'i lha/ rlan pa 
12.11(1): kun sdud sku mdog sngo/ g.yas pas kun 'byung rin chen bsnams/ yum chen tshor 
12.12(1): ba gsal byed ma/ rta mchog nyi zla pad ma'i gdan/ nub phyogs dbus kyi pad ma 
12.13(1): la/ 'du shes phung po dag pa'i lha/ gsal ba smin byed sku mdog dmar/ g.yas 
12.14(1): pas skyon bral pad ma bsnams/ yum chen chags med 'od 'phro ma/ g.yas 'khyud 
12.15(1): g.yon pas bum pa 'dzin/ rma bya nyi zla pad ma'i gdan/ byang phyogs dbus kyi pad 
12.16(1): ma la/ 'du byed phung po dag pa'i lha/ sgrol byed kun skyod sku mdog ljang / g.yas na 
12.17(1): ral gri bsam gcod bsnams/ yum chen sgrol ma skyod byed ma/ g.yas 'khyud g.yon 
12.18(1): pas bum pa 'dzin/ shang shang nyi zla pad ma'i gdan/ yum lnga sku mdog yab dang 
12.19(1): mthun/ zhi ba'i rgyan rnams yongs su rdzogs/ g.yas g.yon lha mo mdzes ma brgyad/
12.20(1): shar phyogs g.yas kyi pad ma la/ 'degs byed lha mo kun 'byung ma/ phyag na gsal 
12.21(1): byed pad ma bsnams/ g.yon na kun rten me long 'dzin/ mdzes ma dkar ljang 
13.1(1): dkar mthing ngo / /lho phyogs g.yas kyi pad ma la/ sdud byed lha mo 'od gsal ma/
13.2(1): g.yon na sdud byed kun sbyong ma// mdzes ma dkar sngo sngo dmar ma/ phyag na rin chen 
13.3(1): rgyal mtshan bsnams/ nub phyogs g.yas g.yon pad ma la/ kun smin ma dang drod 
13.4(1): 'bebs ma/ sku mdog dmar mthing dmar ljang la/ phyag na me yi pad ma bsnams/
13.5(1): byang phyogs g.yas g.yon pad ma la/ skyong byed ma dang sgrol byed ma/ sku mdog ljang 
13.6(1): khu dkar dmar brgyan/ phyag na rlung gi rgya gram bsnams/ dkyil 'khor bar khyams 
13.7(1): lha snam la/ mchod pa'i lha mo nyi shu gnas/ shar phyogs gzugs kyi lha mo ni/ dri ro 
13.8(1): reg dang bon sogs lnga/ lho phyogs dri yi lha mo ni/ de dag lnga lngas brgyan pa dgod/
13.9(1): nub phyogs ro la de bzhin brgyan/ byang phyogs reg dang de bzhin no/ /sgo bzhir 
13.10(1): sgo ma chen mo bzhi/ shar du rngam chen seng ge'i gdong / lho phyogs dregs chen stag 
13.11(1): gi gdong / nub phyogs gtum chen dred kyi gdong / byang phyogs sgrol byed chu srin 
13.12(1): gdong / de ltar lha tshogs rdzogs par dgod/ ces mkha' 'gro rin chen phreng ba'i 
13.13(1): rgyud las/ lha tshogs dgod pa'i le'u ste dgu pa'o// /
13.14(1): 7 ye shes mkha' 'gros bka' bstsal pa/ dam tshig mkha' 'gro las sogs te/
13.15(1): phun sum 'tshogs pa'i 'khor rnams kun/ rtse gcig pa yi yid kyis nyon/ rjes 
13.16(1): 'jug mos pa'i gshen rabs la/ dbang rim rgyas pa byed dus su/ zhi khro gang rung 
13.17(1): gzhung bsrangs la/ zhag gsum lnga'am bdun khongs su/ phrin las tshogs mchod 
13.18(1): bzhi'am drug /mi 'bral nar mar byas rjes la/ dbang gi dkyil 'khor 'jug sngon 
13.19(1): du/ lha tshogs bstod pa 'di dag gis/ khams dang skye mched byin gyis rlobs/
13.20(1): rang grol bdal pa'i zhing khams nas/ kun bzang yab yum dgongs su gsol/ mi 
13.21(1): 'byed mnyam pa'i zhing khams nas/ rigs lnga yab yum dgongs su gsol/ gsal 
14.1(1): ba 'od kyi zhing khams nas/ sprul sku sems dpa' dgongs su gsol/ longs spyod 
14.2(1): rgyan gyi zhing khams nas/ dus gsum bla ma dgongs su gsol/ yang dag gsum gyi 
14.3(1): zhing khams nas/ dad ldan pho mo dgongs su gsol/ dbus phyogs kun khyab nam 
14.4(1): mkha'i gzhal yas nas/ nyon mongs rnam shes phung po yang dag cing / me long ye 
14.5(1): shes rang 'byung gsal ba'i lha/ yang dag don la bzhengs bzhugs mi mnga' yang /
14.6(1): dad mos gshen rabs dbang mchog bstsal ba'i phyir/ rtsal rdzogs seng chen bsnol 
14.7(1): ba'i khri stengs su/ nyi zla pad ma brtsegs pa'i gdan stengs su/ kun tu bzang po 
14.8(1): yab yum sku mchog bzhengs/ sku mdog mthing ka zhal gcig phyag gnyis pa/ mnyam 
14.9(1): pa'i phyag rgya rdzogs pa'i skyil krung bzhugs/ bon nyid don mtshon mi 'gyur g.yung 
14.10(1): drung bsnams/ kun tu bzang mo yum dang gnyis med 'khril/ sku mdog mthing kha 
14.11(1): yab kyi cha lugs 'dzin/ shes rab dbang chen bstsal phyir bum pa stob/ gnyis 
14.12(1): med thabs dang shes rab dbang chen gsol/ theg dgu rang sar grol ba'i dbang 
14.13(1): mchog gsol/ sa lam rang mdangs chen po'i dbang mchog gsol/ zag med 
14.14(1): bsam mi khyab pa'i dbang mchog gsol/ dngos grub thabs chen thob pa'i dbang 
14.15(1): mchog gsol/ rjes 'jug dad mos ldan pa'i rigs can rnams/ dbang bskur sa 
14.16(1): rnams g.yo zhing 'phags gyur cig /oM shar phyogs sra brtan sa yi gzhal yas nas/
14.17(1): nyon mongs gzugs kyi phung po yang dag cing / stong nyid rang 'byung ye shes gsal 
14.18(1): ba'i lha/ yang dag don la bzhengs bzhugs mi mnga' yang / dad mos gshen 
14.19(1): rabs dbang mchog bstsal ba'i phyir/ stobs chen glang chen bsnol ba'i khri stengs su/
14.20(1): nyi zla pad ma brtsegs pa'i gdan stengs su/ brtan pa kun skyed yab yum sku mchog 
14.21(1): bzhengs/ sku mdog dkar po zhal gcig phyag gnyis pa/ mnyam pa'i phyag rgya rdzogs 
15.1(1): pa'i skyil krung bzhugs/ snang srid dbang sgyur bon gyi 'khor lo bsnams/ yum chen 
15.2(1): mi g.yo brtan byed gnyis med 'khril/ sku mdog dkar mo yab kyi cha lugs 'dzin/
15.3(1): shes rab dbang mchog bstsal phyir bum pa stob/ gnyis med thabs dang shes rab 
15.4(1): dbang chen gsol/ theg dgu rang sar grol ba'i dbang mchog gsol/ sa lam rang 
15.5(1): mdangs chen po'i dbang mchog gsol/ zag med bsam mi khyab pa'i dbang mchog 
15.6(1): gsol/ dngos grub thabs chen thob pa'i dbang mchog gsol/ rjes 'jug dad 
15.7(1): mos ldan pa'i rigs can rnams/ dbang bskur sa rnams g.yo zhing 'phags gyur 
15.8(1): cig /A+o~M lho phyogs rlan pa chu yi gzhal yas nas/ nyon mongs tshor ba'i phung po 
15.9(1): yongs dag cing / mnyam nyid ye shes rang 'byung gsal ba'i lha/ yang dag don la 
15.10(1): bzhengs bzhugs mi mnga' yang / dad mos shes rab dbang mchog bstsal ba'i phyir/
15.11(1): shugs ldan rta mchog bsnol ba'i gdan stengs su/ nyi zla pad ma brtsegs pa'i 
15.12(1): gdan stengs su/ rlan pa kun sdud yab yum sku mchog bzhengs/ sku mdog sngon po 
15.13(1): zhal gcig phyag gnyis pa/ mnyam pa'i phyag rgya rdzogs pa'i skyil krung bzhugs/
15.14(1): dngos grub kun 'byung rin chen 'bar ba bsnams/ yum chen tshor ba gsal byed 
15.15(1): gnyis med 'khril/ sku mdog sngon mo yab kyi cha lugs 'dzin/ shes rab dbang 
15.16(1): mchog bstsal phyir bum pa stob/ / gnyis med thabs dang shes rab dbang chen gsol/
15.17(1): theg dgu rang sar grol ba'i dbang mchog gsol/ sa lam rang mdangs chen po'i 
15.18(1): dbang mchog gsol/ zag med bsam mi khyab pa'i dbang mchog gsol/ dngos 
15.19(1): grub thabs chen thob pa'i dbang mchog gsol/ rjes 'jug dad mos ldan pa'i 
15.20(1): rigs can rnams/ dbang bskur sa rnams g.yo zhing 'phags gyur cig /A+o~M nub 
15.21(1): phyogs gsal sreg me yi gzhal yas nas/ nyon mongs 'du shes phung po yongs dag 
16.1(1): cing / kun rtogs rang byung ye shes gsal ba'i lha/ yang dag don la bzhengs 
16.2(1): bzhugs mi mnga' yang / dad mos gshen rabs dbang mchog bstsal ba'i phyir/
16.3(1): dbang chen rma bya bsnol ba'i khri stengs su/ nyi zla pad ma brtsegs pa'i gdan stengs 
16.4(1): su/ gsal ba smin byed yab yum sku mchog bzhengs/ sku mdog dmar po zhal 
16.5(1): gcig phyag gnyis pa/ mnyam pa'i phyag rgya rdzogs pa'i skyil krung bzhugs/ chags 
16.6(1): med skyon bral pad ma dmar po bsnams/ yum chen chags med 'od 'bar gnyis 
16.7(1): med 'khril/ sku mdog dmar mo yab kyi cha lugs 'dzin/ shes rab dbang mchog 
16.8(1): bstsal phyir bum pa stob/ gnyis med thabs dang shes rab dbang chen gsol/ theg 
16.9(1): dgu rang sar grol ba'i dbang mchog gsol/ sa lam rang mdangs chen po'i dbang 
16.10(1): mchog gsol/ zag med bsam mi khyab pa'i dbang mchog gsol/ dngos grub 
16.11(1): thabs chen thob pa'i dbang mchog gsol/ rjes 'jug dad mos ldan pa'i rigs 
16.12(1): can rnams/ dbang bskur sa rnams g.yo zhing 'phags gyur cig /oM byang phyogs 
16.13(1): skyod byed rlung gi gzhal yas nas/ nyon mongs 'du byed phung po yongs dag cing /
16.14(1): bya grub ye shes rang 'byung gsal ba'i lha/ yang dag don la bzhengs bzhugs mi 
16.15(1): mnga' yang / dad mos shes rab dbang mchog bstsal ba'i phyir/ smra shes shang shang 
16.16(1): bsnol ba'i khri stengs su/ nyi zla pad ma brtsegs pa'i gdan stengs su/ sgrol byed 
16.17(1): kun skyob yab yum sku mchog bzhengs/ sku mdog ljang khu zhal gcig phyag gnyis pa/
16.18(1): mnyam pa'i phyag rgya rdzogs pa'i skyil krung bzhugs/ nyon mongs kun gcod shes rab 
16.19(1): ral gri bsnams/ yum chen sgrol ma skyod byed gnyis med 'khril/ sku mdog ljang mo 
16.20(1): yab kyi cha lugs 'dzin/ shes rab dbang mchog bstsal phyir bum pa stob/ gnyis 
16.21(1): med thabs dang shes rab dbang chen gsol/ theg dgu rang sar grol ba'i dbang 
17.1(1): mchog gsol/ sa lam rang mdangs chen po'i dbang mchog gsol/ zag med 
17.2(1): bsam mi khyab pa'i dbang mchog gsol/ dngos grub thabs chen thob pa'i dbang 
17.3(1): mchog gsol/ rjes 'jug dad mos ldan pa'i rigs can rnams/ dbang bskur sa 
17.4(1): rnams g.yo zhing 'phags gyur cig /oM shar phyogs g.yas kyi pad ma la/ 'degs 
17.5(1): byed sa yi lha mo kun 'byung ma/ sku mdog dkar mo na bza' g.yu mdog mdzes/
17.6(1): rin chen mdzes pa'i rgyan spras do shal can/ bzhengs tshul gsal byed 'phrul gyi me 
17.7(1): long bsnams/ rjes 'jug skal ldan gshen rabs bdag cag la/ sa ltar brtan 
17.8(1): zhing rtag pa'i dngos grub gsol/ A+o~M shar phyogs g.yon gyi pad ma la/ 'degs byed 
17.9(1): sa yi lha mo kun brten ma/ sku mdog dkar mo na bza' g.yu mdog mdzes/ rin 
17.10(1): chen mdzes pa'i rgyan spras do shal can/ bzhengs tshul gsal byed 'phrul gyi me long 
17.11(1): bsnams/ rjes 'jug skal ldan gshen rab bdag cag la/ sa ltar brtan zhing rtag 
17.12(1): pa'i dngos grub gsol/ A+o~M lho phyogs g.yas kyi pad ma la/ sdud byed chu yi lha mo 'od 
17.13(1): gsal ma/ sku mdog sngon mo na bza' dung ltar mdzes/ rin chen mdzes pa'i rgyan 
17.14(1): spras do shal can/ bzhengs tshul kun 'byung rin chen rgyal mtshan bsnams/ rjes 
17.15(1): 'jug skal ldan gshen rabs bdag cag la/ chu ltar rlan zhing sdud pa'i dngos 
17.16(1): grub gsol/ A+o~M lho phyogs g.yon gyi pad ma la/ sdud byed chu yi lha mo kun sbyong ma/
17.17(1): sku mdog sngon mo na bza' zangs ltar mdzes/ rin chen mdzes pa'i rgyan spras do 
17.18(1): shal can/ bzhengs tshul kun 'byung rin chen rgyal mtshan bsnams/ rjes 'jug 
17.19(1): skal ldan gshen rabs bdag cag la/ chu ltar rlan zhing sdud pa'i dngos grub 
17.20(1): gsol/ A+o~M nub phyogs g.yas kyi pad ma la/ sreg byed me yi lha mo kun smin ma/ sku 
17.21(1): mdog dmar mo na bza' mthing ltar mdzes/ rin chen mdzes pa'i rgyan spras do 
18.1(1): shal can/ bzhengs tshul skyon bral pad ma dmar po bsnams/ rjes 'jug skal ldan 
18.2(1): gshen rabs bdag cag la/me ltar smin zhing 'bar ba'i dngos grub gsol/ A+o~M 
18.3(1): nub phyogs g.yon gyi pad ma la/ sreg byed me yi lha mo drod 'bebs ma/sku mdog 
18.4(1): dmar mo na bza' ljang khu mdzes/ rin chen mdzes pa'i rgyan spras do shal can/
18.5(1): bzhengs tshul skyon bral pad ma dmar po bsnams/ rjes 'jug skal ldan gshen 
18.6(1): rabs bdag cag la/ me ltar smin zhing 'bar ba'i dngos grub gsol/ A+o~M byang 
18.7(1): phyogs g.yas kyi pad ma la/ 'tshubs byed rlung gi lha mo skyod byed ma/ sku mdog ljang 
18.8(1): khu na bza' zangs ltar mdzes/ rin chen mdzes pa'i rgyan spras do shal can/
18.9(1): bzhengs tshul kun sgrol rlung gi rgya gram bsnams/ rjes 'jug skal ldan gshen rabs 
18.10(1): bdag cag la/ rig pa mkha' la bskyod pa'i dngos grub gsol/ oM byang phyogs 
18.11(1): g.yon gyi pad ma la/ 'tshubs byed rlung gi lha mo sgrol byed ma/ sku mdog ljang khu na 
18.12(1): bza' dung ltar mdzes/ rin chen mdzes pa'i rgyan spras do shal can/ bzhengs tshul 
18.13(1): kun sgrol rlung gi rgya gram bsnams/ rjes 'jug skal ldan gshen rabs bdag cag 
18.14(1): la/ rig pa mkha' la bskyod pa'i dngos grub gsol/ A+o~M dkyil 'khor de yi phyi rim 
18.15(1): na/ rin chen dung gi lha snam la/ shar gyi phyogs nas mchod 'bul lnga/ rin chen 
18.16(1): gzugs kyi lha mos me long 'dzin/ rin chen sgra yi lha mos rnga gshang 'dzin/ rin 
18.17(1): chen dri yi lha mos spos khang 'dzin/ rin chen ro yi lha mos zhal zas 'dzin/ rin 
18.18(1): chen reg bya'i lha mos rgyan cha 'dzin/ rin chen bon gyi lha mos po ti 'dzin/ sgrub 
18.19(1): gshen 'byung lnga ye shes lngar gsal nas/ sku lnga grub pa'i dbang mchog bstsal ba'i 
18.20(1): phyir/ mchod pa'i lha mos byin gyis brlab tu gsol/ A+o~M dkyil 'khor de yi phyi rim 
18.21(1): na/ rin chen g.yu yi lha snam la/ lho yi phyogs nas mchod 'bul lnga/ rin chen 
19.1(1): gzugs kyi lha mos me long 'dzin/ rin chen sgra yi lha mos rnga gshang 'dzin/ rin 
19.2(1): chen dri yi lha mos spos khang 'dzin/ rin chen ro yi lha mos zhal zas 'dzin/ rin 
19.3(1): chen reg bya'i lha mos rgyan cha 'dzin/ rin chen bon gyi lha mos po ti 'dzin/ sgrub 
19.4(1): gshen 'byung lnga ye shes lnga gsal nas/ sku lnga grub pa'i dbang mchog bstsal ba'i 
19.5(1): phyir/ mchod pa'i lha mos byin gyis brlab tu gsol/ A+o~M dkyil 'khor de yi phyi rim 
19.6(1): na/ rin chen zangs kyi lha snam la/ nub kyi phyogs nas mchod 'bul lnga/ rin chen 
19.7(1): gzugs kyi lha mos me long 'dzin/ rin chen sgra yi lha mos rnga gshang 'dzin/ rin 
19.8(1): chen dri yi lha mos spos khang 'dzin/ rin chen ro yi lha mos zhal zas 'dzin/ rin 
19.9(1): chen reg bya'i lha mos rgyan cha 'dzin/ rin chen bon gyi lha mos po ti 'dzin/ sgrub 
19.10(1): gshen 'byung lnga ye shes lnga gsal nas/ sku lnga grub pa'i dbang mchog bstsal ba'i 
19.11(1): phyir/ mchod pa'i lha mos byin gyis brlab tu gsol/ A+o~M dkyil 'khor de yi phyi rim 
19.12(1): na/ rin chen be dur ljang khu'i lha snam la/ byang gi phyogs nas mchod 'bul lnga/
19.13(1): rin chen gzugs kyi lha mos me long 'dzin/ rin chen sgra yi lha mos rnga gshang 'dzin/
19.14(1): rin chen dri yi lha mos spos khang 'dzin/ rin chen ro yi lha mos zhal zas 'dzin/
19.15(1): rin chen reg bya'i lha mos rgyan cha 'dzin/ rin chen bon gyi lha mos po ti 'dzin/
19.16(1): sgrub gshen 'byung lnga ye shes lnga gsal nas/ sku lnga grub pa'i dbang mchog bstsal 
19.17(1): ba'i phyir/ mchod pa'i lha mos byin gyis brlab tu gsol/ A+o~M dkyil 'khor de yi sgo 
19.18(1): bzhi na/ shar gyi sgo ma rngam chen seng ge'i gdong / sku mdog dkar mo tha ber dkar 
19.19(1): khra gsol/ khro gnyer 'jigs ma 'khor los phyogs mtshams srung / dbang chen 
19.20(1): dngos grub bar chad bsrung du gsol/ lho yi sgo ma dregs chen stag gi gdong / sku 
19.21(1): mdog sngon mo tha ber sngo khra gsol/ khro gnyer 'jigs ma dbyug thos phyogs mtshams 
20.1(1): srung / dbang chen dngos grub bar chad bsrung du gsol/ nub kyi sgo ma gtum chen 
20.2(1): dred kyi gdong / sku mdog dmar mo tha ber dmar khra gsol/ khro gnyer 'jigs ma 
20.3(1): dgra stas phyogs mtshams srung /dbang chen dngos grub bar chad bsrung du gsol/

38.5(1): te/ phyi nang gsang ba yang gsang bzhi/ gsang ba yi ge'i rig sngags dang / gnas 
38.6(1): pa ting 'dzin rig sngags dang / btags pa ming gi rig sngags dang / bzlas pa 
38.7(1): tshig gi rig sngags bzhi/ mu tra tad rgya rig sngags so/ /gsang sngags ngo bo bstan pa 
38.8(1): ni/ ngo bo thabs dang shes rab bcas/ nges tshig log shes can la gsang / thabs 
38.9(1): chung shes rab dman la gsang / dad ldan dbang po rno la bsngags/ gsang sngags 
38.10(1): dbye na bzhi yin te/ gab pa'i don gyis gsang ba dang / sbas pa'i don gyi gsang ba 
38.11(1): dang / mi bstan don gyi gsang ba dang / rang bzhin sbas pa'i gsang ba'o/ /yul 
38.12(1): snang ngos nas phye la bstan/ gzu lum ra chod mkhan la gab/ log lta mu stegs can 
38.13(1): la sba/ theg dman lha mi don mi bstan/ skye bo rang gsang thabs kyis chod/ don ni 
38.14(1): rnam bzhi gong gis 'gres/ bzlas pa tshig gi gsang sngags ni/ oM gyis drangs nas 
38.15(1): pho mor 'brel/ gsang sngags don du shes par bya/ gzungs sngags ngo bo 'di lta 
38.16(1): ste/ mos pa shes rab bcas pa'o/ /nges tshig thabs 'dzin shes rab 'dzin/ dbye 
38.17(1): ba rnam pa gsum yin te/ phyi dang nang dang gsang ba gsum/ don gyi ngos nas 
38.18(1): phye ba'o/ /rtags kyi ngos nas phye ba ni/ rig gis song bas rig sngags so/ /gsang 
38.19(1): nas bzhag pas gsang sngags so/ /gsum ka gzungs pas gzungs sngags so/ /phyi 
38.20(1): nang snod bcud ma lus kun/ sngags nyid gsum du shes par bya/ tshig gi gzungs 
38.21(1): sngags bstan pa ni/ na mos drangs pa gzungs sngags so/ /spyi ru gsum du shes par 
39.1(1): bya/ rgyu ma nor ba rtsa ba'i sngags/ bskyed pa rkyen gyi sngags dag dang / bzlas pa las 
39.2(1): kyi sngags dang gsum/ zhes mkha' 'gro rin chen phreng ba'i rgyud las/ sngags kyi don 
39.3(1): bstan pa'i le'u ste nyer gnyis pa'o/ //
39.4(1): 7 ye shes mkha' 'gros bka' bstsal pa/ dam tshig mkha' 'gro las sogs 
39.5(1): te/ phun sum 'tshogs pa'i 'khor rnams kun/ rtse gcig pa yi yid kyis nyon/ ye 
39.6(1): shes lha la mchod pa dang / dbyings nyid don la gnas pa dang / dam can srung ma 
39.7(1): bskang ba dang / tshe dang dbang thang bskyed pa dang / gshen rab bar chad bsal 
39.8(1): ba dang / nyams chag 'khrul pa gso ba dang / 'gro drug snying rjes tshims bya'i phyir/
39.9(1): phrin las rnam bzhi rdzogs pa dang / gtor ma'i rtog pa bsdus te bstan/ dang po 
39.10(1): phrin las don bstan pa/ ngo bo nges tshig dbye ba dang / ldang tshad dang ni yon tan 
39.11(1): no/ /ngo bo 'jug pa byang chub sems/ phrin las nges tshig bstan pa ni/ bde bar 
39.12(1): gshegs pa'i phrin btab nas/ 'gro ba sgrol ba'i las byed pa'o/ /dbye na zhi rgyas 
39.13(1): dbang drag bzhi/ gsang sngags thabs mchog ldan pa des/ gnas dang zhal gyi 
39.14(1): mtshan nyid ni/ zhi ba shar du bltas pa'o/ /rgyas pa lho ru bltas pa'o/ /dbang la nub

39.16(1): gdan de las/ rim pa rnam bzhi rdzogs byed na/ zhi ba'i dus su shar du blta/ lho

40.8(1): gsum pa'o/ //

40.21(1): gyi gtor ma shes par bya/ zla ba chu shel chu dang gsum/ dkar gyi gtor ma shes par

46.1(1): chibs su ra skyes kham pa bcibs/ kha nas dbal gyi tsha tsha 'phro/ lag na me dar

46.5(1): 7 ye shes mkha' 'gros bka' bstsal pa/ dam tshig mkha' 'gro las sogs te/

46.17(1): myur mgyogs gshegs su gsol/ ag ne dza la ye ram ram ram dza dza dza/ nyi shu rtsa

46.21(1): bskang / dkyil 'khor lha la bcud kyang stob/ chibs su ra skyes kham pa bcibs/
47.1(1): srin po 'dul phyir srin po'i skur bzhengs nas/ nyams chags bskang zhing phrin las

47.3(1): su gsol/ ag ne ra tsa sa ma ya ti sta lhan lhan/ de nas mchod pa 'bul ba ni/

47.7(1): zhim bye brag 'di lta ste/ ga pur shing kun rgya spos dang / ka ra gro tshe shu dag dang /
47.8(1): spang spos brag spos gla rtsi'am/ gu gul tsan dan dkar dmar dang / ljon te dkar 
47.9(1): po 'brug rus sogs/ dbang sdud me lha khyod nyid la/ mchod pa'i phrin las chen po

47.11(1): gsol/ ag ne ra tsa du pe spa ra ya/ A+o~M ye shes me yi gzhal yas na/ bon nyid

56.10(1): gnyer can zhes shu dag gnag /pa tra zhes bya mi tshil dang / gyi ra ra thug rmang kha 
56.11(1): dang / bdud rtsi zhes bya dri chen dang / mi bskyod pa zhes dri chu dang / dug gi me 
56.12(1): tog rma bya'i mdongs/ gtso bos gzhi bya gzhan cha bsnyam/ zhib btags zho tsam na 
56.13(1): sar byug /lus kun byugs na rab tu bzang / rdzas nyung rdzas byug ba ko tsam/ sha 
56.14(1): 'phrig (mkhregs ) rtsa 'khum sha ro dang / mi bde kun byug gdon mi za/ bdug pa'i 
56.15(1): ril bu sran 'bring tsam/ lto stong sna bdug gdon rims 'bros/ dri chen dri chu dug 
56.16(1): mu zi/ gla rtsi dang ni ga bur lnga/ cha mnyam zhib btags ril bu bya/ sran ma 'bring 
56.17(1): tsam dri chus sbyar/ lto stong skabs btang bgegs kun 'bros/ rtsa ba lnga yis byas pa 
56.18(1): yi/ bsnan pas rdzas don bcu gcig ces/ yang bsnan rdzas don bcu drug pa/ khyad 
56.19(1): par klu la bsngags pa yin/ mang sbyor rdzas sbyor lnga bcu dgu/ nyung sbyor zhes bya bcu 
56.20(1): gcig pa/ drag sbyor dug rnams phyogs gcig bsog /zhi sbyor sman rnams bsog 
56.21(1): pa'o/ /rdzas rnams kun bsog byug par shis/ ltor btang rdzas rnams dri chus sbyar/
57.1(1): bdug pa la yang thams cad do/ /ma yig zhes bya thams cad 'tshogs/ bu yig gang 
57.2(1): la gang phan no/ /khyad par rdzas sna bcu drug ni/ gu gul nag po mu zi nag /zi ra 
57.3(1): nag dang shu dag nag /mi sha gla rtsi tshil chen dang / sgog skya spru yi rtsa ba dang / rta 
57.4(1): bon po dang spyang khu'i brun/ btsan dug ra dug khyi yi brun/ skye tshe shang tshe glang ru'i 
57.5(1): gzhob/ rgyas par sbyar byug khyad par rdzas/ bong nga nag po gla rtsi dang / sgog skya rtsa 
57.6(1): gcig dug mu zi/ tshil chen de lngas lus po srung / 'bros pa'i dug bzhi bcang pa 
57.7(1): ni/ thar nu gla ba tshil chen dang / btsan dug rnam bzhi lus la gdags/ gu gul 
57.8(1): nag po gla rtsi dang / shing kun zo sha dud pa dang / chang rgod sha chen sgog skya dang /
57.9(1): btsan dug rnams sbyar sha 'phrig (mkhregs )gam/ bas ldags sha ro skya bkra 'am/ shu 
57.10(1): ba g.yan pa las sogs pa/ na sar bsku mnye nyi mas bdug /nad dang gdon las 
57.11(1): thar bar 'gyur/ gu gul nag po thal chen dang / tshil chen til nag mu zi nag /bya 
57.12(1): rgod spos dang sgog skya dang / rta bon po dang gla rtsi dang / dri chen dri chu bcu gcig po/
57.13(1): sbyar la nub mo lus thog byug /lha klu srin po'i gdon rnams thub/ gla rtsi phog rog ma 
57.14(1): mchu dang / ra dug rmang dbre spyang khu'i brun/ btsan dug dang ni mu zi dang / thal 
57.15(1): chen gser dang rnam brgyad po/ de rnams btags la lus la bcang / rdzas bsag 
57.16(1): lo dus bsnan par bya/ 'byung pos mi tshugs mdze rigs 'chad/ rims dang myo ba 
57.17(1): thams cad sos/ mi yis ma reg mi blta zhing / mchog tu bud med reg mi gzhug /
57.18(1): mi 'gom thu yugs btang mi bya/ rdzas la skyug bro mi blta zhing / gar 'gro lus la 
57.19(1): rtag tu bcangs/ mthu dang mdze dang rims rnams dang / skrangs 'bur gag lhog 
57.20(1): thams cad bsrung / 'dir bshad dug sna thams cad dang / rta g.yag ra lug khyi 
57.21(1): sogs te/ nag po'i khrag rnams 'tshogs na rab/ khra dang bya glag so bya sogs/ sha 
58.1(1): zan sha ni shin tu gces/ khyad par smyon pa 'dul ba'i rdzas/ thal chen til nag mu 
58.2(1): zi dang / mi khrag rta khrag phag khrag dang / 'ol ma ze 'bras spang spos dang / brag 
58.3(1): nag dregs pa khyi lce ba/ gla ba gro ga phog rog sgro/ 'ug sgro mtshe dang lang tang tse/ zi 
58.4(1): ra sha tshil byi thang ka/ pi pi ling dang na le sham/ ram dang lo btsan me tog dang /
58.5(1): rgya skags zhu mkhan bul tog dang / mon sran ug chos mar nag dang / spang rgyan 
58.6(1): dang ni gan sdeb dang / g.yag po ru ru ra yi sha/ sri shing mo yi 'bru khu dang / zangs 
58.7(1): rtsi 'bram bu skyung ka'i sgro/ rta tshil bong tshil phyi tshil dang / dur byid brag zhun go snyod 
58.8(1): phabs/ ltor btang du ba bdug gyur na/ smyon pa thams cad sos par 'gyur/ byug 
58.9(1): na mdze nad thams cad sos/ rdzas sbyor dus kyi dam tshig ni/ me dang nyi ma kha ba 
58.10(1): spang / kar ma mu tra chang mang spang / mtshams bcad mi yis mi mthong sbyar/ bud 
58.11(1): med shin tu spang ba yin/ zhes mkha' 'gro rin chen phreng ba'i rgyud las/ khyad par 
58.12(1): gyi sman sbyar thabs bstan pa'i le'u ste sum cu pa'o// //
58.13(1): 7 ye shes mkha' 'gros bka' bstsal pa/ dam tshig mkha' 'gro las sogs te/

58.15(1): thugs kyi gsang sgo nas/ yang gsang brnag pa'i sbyor ba byung / 'di yi yon tan 
58.16(1): bsam mi khyab/ dri tshor tshe tshad bye ba thub/ mchog dang thun mong dngos grub 'du/
58.17(1): reg pa tsam gyis mdze nad dang / lhog rgod 'brum nag gag pa dang / nad rigs 
58.18(1): thams cad 'joms par 'gyur/ bdug pas smyos pa sos par 'gyur/ ltor btang 
58.19(1): nad gdon khong zhugs sos/ dud pas smyo dang mdze sogs sos/ byug pas dus min 
58.20(1): 'chi ba dang / skrangs dang sha bkra bas ldags sos/ 'di nyid mdzo thod rdzas blugs 
58.21(1): nas/ klu la gtad na thog ser 'bebs/ sngags pa'i ltor btang byug bdugs na/

59.6(1): skabs so// //

59.17(1): bstan pa ni/ spyi bor k+Sha ra Sha Ta Tha Da Na'o/ /rkan nas ta tha da d+ha na'o/ /lce dkyil 
59.18(1): tsa tsha dza dz+ha nya'o/ /lce rtse dag nas ri rI'o/ /swo yi dkyil nas li lI'o/ /swo yi rtse nas 
59.19(1): sha Sha sa'o/ /mchu nas pa pha ba b+ha ma'o/ /mgrin nas ka kha ga g+ha nga'o/ /khong nas 
59.20(1): rang 'byung a dang ha/ /yi ge gcod pa'i tshig 'dren ni/ yi ge gnyis brtsegs tshig 
59.21(1): drag sbrel/ /rdum rdum bklag pa man ngag go /'thug po g+ha dz+ha d+ha b+ha'o/ chen po Ta Tha 
60.1(1): Da Na'o/ /'dren pa 'a yis 'drel pa'o/ /drag 'dren ni/ d+ha \u0fa8 sh+r+'i \u0fa8 drag gis bcad

60.4(1): pa'i le'u ste so gnyis pa'o// //

60.7(1): kyi bod lugs bstan par bya/ dka' ba sngags kyi mtshan nyid ni/ byin rlabs myur 
60.8(1): phyir bkrol te bshad/ k+y+'a gshi ring ngam ni khri nam zhes/ smri smri ring ngam ni smrar 
60.9(1): ring po'o/ /sbreshe ring stug po sra tra he/ lhu ring la ha hu zhes so/ /sgya khya ring ngam ni 
60.10(1): gsha' ring stug /smyu smyu ring stug gam smra yum mo/ /s+t+rI stu ring po'am sti mthug drag /
60.11(1): T+ThaM khri ma ring ngam gsham ring ngo / /sgya khrim zhes sam ni khra na ha'i/ d+h+ya ring po'am 
60.12(1): sgra mthug go /k+Shu khri ring ngam ni khra hi'o/ /smyo smra ye 'am ni smra me'o/ /sgya khya stug ring 
60.13(1): ngam gsha' ya zhes/ hUM tsu ring stug gam tra hUM zhes/ b+hi b+ha hi 'am ni b+ha ni'o/ /sbya 
60.14(1): mya ring po'am ma ring po/ b+h+ya pha ha ring po 'am phat+ya'o/ /k+y+'a skyi nam kha ni shes su 
60.15(1): grags/ d+h+ya da ring 'thug gam 'da' ya'o/ /b+he we ring po'am we 'thug po/ Ta tha 
60.16(1): Da Na Sha/ tra thra dra nra sra zhes so/ /Sh+ya gnya' ring po'am nya ya'o/ /sh+ya gsha' ring po 
60.17(1): 'am ni sha ya'o/ /Sh+TA gsha' ring ngam ni pra ti zhes/ t+yaM ta ring ngam ni tam ya'o/ /n+ta 
60.18(1): ta 'am ni tsa tra'o/ /l+yaM la ring po 'am lim du'o/ /n+ya na ring po'am na ya'o/ /tsU tsung 
60.19(1): zhes pa'am tsa pi'o/ /thuX gsha' tra 'am ni tra ya'o/ /tsu ring po'am ni tsa ya'o/ /th+ya 
60.20(1): tha 'thug po'am tha ya'o/ /hUM hung dang hUM du grags pa'o/ /ruM ru ma dang ra mung zhes 
60.21(1): pa'o/ /Sh+TA th+'a ring 'thug gam tred ho'o/ /b+hi b+hi b+ha nir zhes pa'o/ /N+ya ni'am na ya zhes 
61.1(1): su grags/ ng+hu tri ring po'am dang ra yi/ N+ya ya ring po'am ni ya ya'o/ /n+ni Nin nam 
61.2(1): rni ru shes pa'o/ /A+o~M A+o~M ring oM thung A+ong du'o/ /kyai khyi 'thug ring ngam khyim sher zhes/
61.3(1): thU sra du ru 'am gshu' drag po/ kh+k+ra ga sha ra 'am tra dza wa/ b+h+ya tha ham tha yam gnyis 
61.4(1): su grags/ b+hu pra ring 'thug dang pa brang zhes/ d+hU sri ha dang ni sra tra hi/ snra ka shri ra 
61.5(1): ma na zhes so/ /skra kas ma'u zhes su grags/ klu ke mi'i zhes su grags pa'o/ /kyu khya kre

61.8(1): bstan pa'i le'u ste so gsum pa'o// //
61.9(1): 7 ye shes mkha' 'gros bka' bstsal pa/ dam tshig mkha' 'gro las sogs

61.13(1): gnyis so/ /rka rga rnga rja rnya rta rda rna pa rba rma rtsa rdza rla/ ra mgo thob pa bcu bzhi'o/ /ska

61.17(1): btson nor blu dang lhags pa'i rlung / byams pa'i gnyen dang rdzas mnyed mnyen/ da 
61.18(1): gzod gcad dang sngon du bcad/ gtam sogs bzla dang nam mkha'i zla/ ma bcol

61.21(1): gza' dang kha yis bza'/ zhal nas gsungs dang dri zhim bsrung / sems kyi dga' 
62.1(1): dang 'khogs pa'i rga/ sa phyogs dma' dang lus kyi rma/ byin gyis rlabs dang chu dar 
62.2(1): rlabs/ bro dor mna' dang gdod ma'i gna'/ phongs pa'i dbul dang zhabs tog 
62.3(1): dbul/ tshon rtsi mtshal dang mi 'dod 'tshal/ bya byed mdzad dang yo byad 'dzad/
62.4(1): gdod ma'i sngon dang 'das pa'i sngun/ bden par nges dang 'khrul na nyes/ bon gyi 
62.5(1): phreng dang sems 'phreng ba/ gcod pa'i gri dang snom pa'i dri/ rgya mtsho'i gru dang phugs 
62.6(1): kyi dru/ sems nyid drang dang chu rlung grang / 'bru yi gro dang nyi ma'i dro/ sngar du gyur 
62.7(1): dang da gzod 'gyur/ go byed brda dang ro zhim bda'/ kha dog dkar dang phar la

62.9(1): dgu dang lus dbyibs sgur/ 'og gi sa dang kha yi swo/ rjes 'jug yi ge rnam bcu ni/

62.13(1): 7 ye shes mkha' 'gros bka' bstsal pa/ dam tshig mkha' 'gro las sogs te/

62.18(1): gsum mo yig yin/ ma ning yi ge gcig yin te/ ba la ming gnyis byung bas so/

63.2(1): pa'i yi ge brgyad/ swa tswa dwa shwa tshwa dz+wa zhwa rwa/ zhabs tog byed pa'i yi ge ste/ 'di

63.5(1): dz+dza y+Ya m+ma kla/ 'di sogs yid tsam lci ru bod/ 'go 'dren yi ge dang kyog yin/ lam

63.17(1): ba'i rgyud las/ yi ge'i don nges par bzhag pa'i le'u ste so lnga pa'o// //
63.18(1): 7 ye shes mkha' 'gros bka' bstsal pa/ dam tshig mkha' 'gro las sogs te/

64.1(1): tshan rnam lnga po/ rkan dang lce rtse'i rgyab nas 'byung / ta yi sde tshan sa la bcas/ swo 
64.2(1): lce'i rtse mo gnyis nas 'byung / pa yi sde tshan mchu nas 'byung / wa ni ya swo ma mchu 
64.3(1): nas/ kA ni lce dbus mgrin pa nas/ i I I dang rnam gsum ni/ mgrin rkan 
64.4(1): gnyis nas 'byung ba'o/ /o A+o U yi yi ge gsum/ mchu dang mgrin pa gnyis nas 
64.5(1): 'byung / tsa sogs sde tshan 'bru lnga po/ lce dbus rkan nas 'byung ba'o/ /nga nya Na ma 
64.6(1): dang lnga/ klad skor thig ler shes pa ste/ 'og tu rang gi rigs mthong na/ tha ma'i yi 
64.7(1): ge'i dbang du klogs/ sde tshan lnga yi yi ge lnga/ klad skor thig le dag la tshang / tsa yi 
64.8(1): sde tshan nyar bklag go /ta yi sde tshan mar bklag go /ta tha da na nar bklag go /pa

64.10(1): bya/ dbyangs yig bcu gnyis nga ru bklag /sde tshan dbyangs yig 'di lta ste/ ka 
64.11(1): kha ga g+ha nga / ha a/ tsa tsha dza dz+ha nya sha ya/ Ta Tha Da d+ha Na sha ra/ ta tha da d+ha na sa la/

64.14(1): bstan pa'i le'u ste so drug pa'o/'o/ /sgra bsgyur gyi skabs so// //
64.15(1): 7 ye shes mkha' 'gros bka' bstsal pa/ dam tshig mkha' 'gro las sogs te/
64.16(1): phun sum 'tshogs pa'i 'khor rnams kun/ rtse gcig pa yi yid kyis nyon/ gsang ba 
64.17(1): mkha' spyod gnas su gshegs don du/ phyi rabs don mtshungs rigs rgyud ldan pa 
64.18(1): des/ 'tshogs min nyung 'dus bkra shis gnas mchog tu/ gshen rab bla ma rab tu 
64.19(1): bkur bya zhing / tshogs kyi 'khor los rgyas par bskang zhing mchod/ rol ba'i dus su 
64.20(1): tshig ngag 'di skad brjod/ kye ho/ gzigs shig gsang chen rol pa'i bon/ 'di la 
64.21(1): rnam par rtog mi 'gyur/ bya khyung stag seng khyi phag dang / bram ze gdol sogs 
65.1(1): mnyam par blang / 'gu ya g+ha na pu tsa kha hi ho/ zhes pas dpa' bo las mkhan des/
65.2(1): mtshan ldan bkra shis ka pa lar/ tshogs kyi dngos grub blug par bya/ lag pa g.yas 
65.3(1): bzhag g.yon pa ni/ pad ma'i phyag rgyas skyor la drang / len pa'i tshig ni 'di skad 
65.4(1): brjod/ e ma gsang bdag dpa' bo khyod/ snang ba thabs rol ngo mtshar che/ nyon 
65.5(1): mongs rnam bcad blang bar bya/ g+ha na pu tsa si ti hU~M/ rgyu 'bras tshogs rnams rdzogs 
65.6(1): pa dang / mkha' 'gro pho mo grib bzhin gnas bya dang / dbang bzhi bgrod nas phyag 
65.7(1): rgya rang rtags 'bar/ phyi nang sgrib pa 'byong zhing bar chad rkyen dengs nas/ tshe 
65.8(1): dbang rig 'dzin chen po'i mkha' nyul zhing / 'bras bu sku gsum sa la bgrod par 
65.9(1): 'gyur/ de nas sngon 'gro'i rim ldan nas/ gsang dbang zab mo'i don la 'jug 
65.10(1): dus sam/ rnal 'byor ri khrod dben sa 'grim dus su/ mi sgra khyi sgra chag dus mkha' 
65.11(1): 'gro pho mo bstod/ gshen rabs rang nyams spar ba'i gsung 'di bsgrags/ dang po 
65.12(1): mi 'gyur dbyings kyi mkha' 'gro bstod/ de nas rang 'byung ye shes mkha' 'gro 
65.13(1): bstod/ de nas 'jig rten las kyi mkha' 'gro bstod/ de nas drag 'dul sha zan 
65.14(1): mkha' 'gro bstod/ skabs rnams kun tu A hUM brjod/ A+o~M A hUM mi 'gyur dbyangs 
65.15(1): kyi mkha' klong yangs pa na/ bon nyid stong bdal chen po nam mkha' 'dra/ don 
65.16(1): las mi g.yos kun 'byung rang grol sku/ kun tu bzang po thabs chen yab kyi mkha'/
65.17(1): kun tu bzang mo shes rab dbyings kyi yum/ rtsol bral mkha' ltar dag pa'i sku 
65.18(1): mchog la/ rjes 'jug sngon sbyangs 'phro can gshen rabs bdag /dad mos drag 
65.19(1): po'i stobs kyis gsol ba 'debs/ thugs rje bri gang med pas dgongs mdzod la/
65.20(1): phyogs med bdal khyab dgongs pa'i dngos grub stsol/ ye shes mkha' 'gro dag la 
65.21(1): rab bstod pa/ A+o~M a hU~M/ mkha' gsal dbyings las nyi zla'i 'od 'phro ltar/ bdal 
66.1(1): khyab bon gyi sku las longs sku shar/ dbus phyogs g.yung drung rigs kyi dkyil 'khor 
66.2(1): na/ kun gsal 'byung ba nam mkha'i zhing khams na/ rnam shes phung po yongs su 
66.3(1): dag pa'i lha/ me long ye shes yongs 'dus longs spyod rdzogs/ rjes 'jug bdag gi 
66.4(1): zhe sdang sgrib sbyang phyir/ dad mos drag po'i stobs kyis gsol ba 'debs/ thugs rje 
66.5(1): bri gang med pas dgongs mdzod la/ kun gsal me long ye shes dngos grub stsol/
66.6(1): shar phyogs bder gshegs rigs kyi dkyil 'khor na/ kun gzhi stobs chen sa yi 
66.7(1): zhing khams na/ gzugs kyi phung po yongs su dag pa'i lha/ stong nyid ye shes yongs 
66.8(1): 'dus longs spyod rdzogs/ rjes 'jug bdag gi gti mug sgrib sbyang phyir/ dad mos 
66.9(1): drag po'i stobs kyis gsol ba 'debs/ thugs rje bri gang med pas dgongs mdzod 
66.10(1): la/ bsam 'das stong nyid ye shes dngos grub stsol/ lho phyogs rin chen rigs kyi 
66.11(1): dkyil 'khor na/ rlan gsal sdud byed chu yi zhing khams na/ tshor ba'i phung po 
66.12(1): yongs su dag pa'i lha/ mnyam nyid ye shes yongs 'dus longs spyod rdzogs/ rjes 
66.13(1): 'jug bdag gi nga rgyal sgrib sbyang phyir/ dad mos drag po'i stobs kyis gsol ba 
66.14(1): 'debs/ thugs rje bri gang med pa'i dgongs mdzod la/ kun ldan mnyam nyid ye 
66.15(1): shes dngos grub stsol/ nub phyogs pad ma rigs kyi dkyil 'khor na/ smin byed sreg 
66.16(1): byed me yi zhing khams na/ 'du shes phung po yongs su dag pa'i lha/ kun rtogs ye 
66.17(1): shes yongs 'dus longs spyod rdzogs/ rjes 'jug bdag gi 'dod chags sgrib sbyang 
66.18(1): phyir/ dad mos drag po'i stobs kyis gsol ba 'debs/ thugs rje bri gang med pa'i 
66.19(1): dgongs mdzod la/ 'byed byed kun rtogs ye shes dngos grub stsol/ byang phyogs 
66.20(1): las kyi rigs kyi dkyil 'khor na/ 'degs byed yang byed rlung gi zhing khams na/
66.21(1): 'du byed phung po yongs su dag pa'i lha/ bya grub ye shes yongs 'dus longs spyod 
67.1(1): rdzogs/ rjes 'jug bdag gi phrag dog sgrib sbyang phyir/ dad mos drag po'i stobs 
67.2(1): kyis gsol ba 'debs/ thugs rje bri gang med pas dgongs mdzod la/ las rdzogs

67.4(1): dbus phyogs dbyings kyi yum chen nam mkha'i bde ldan ma/ shar phyogs dbyings kyi

74.9(1): chos zor sgyur zlog chen po mdzod/ nyon dang gtor zan pho mo kun/ ye shes rang 
74.10(1): 'byung byang chub sems/ dbyings kyis ba gar sems zungs la/ thabs dang shes 
74.11(1): rab snyoms zhugs pas/ thar pa'i gshegs shul de na nye/ gsang sngags sa chen de 
74.12(1): yis bgrod/ sa ma ya tsi ta bo d+he su ka ho/ zhes mkha' 'gro rin chen phreng ba'i rgyud 
74.13(1): las/ mkha' 'gro la bstod pa'i le'u ste so bdun pa'o// //
74.14(1): 7 ye shes mkha' 'gros bka' bstsal pa/ dam tshig mkha' 'gro las sogs te/
74.15(1): phun sum 'tshogs pa'i 'khor rnams kun/ rtse gcig pa yi yid kyis nyon/ mkha'

74.17(1): gnad du gzud pa dang / snang ba mkha' 'gror bsgyur ba'o/ /mkha' 'gro lus la 
74.18(1): gzud pa ni/ dbyings kyi mkha' 'gro rnams kyi thugs ka nas/ ye shes kyi 'od zer 
74.19(1): byung nas/ bdag gi tha mal gyi lus sbyangs/ de'i ngang la rig pa byang chub kyi sems 
74.20(1): zla ba'i dkyil 'khor nya gang ba'i steng du/ bdag nyid dam tshig gi mkha' 'gro mar 
74.21(1): bskyed de/ sku mdog sna tshogs mdzes ma la/ phyag g.yas na bstan pa'i rgyal mtshan/
75.1(1): g.yon pas gter gyi bum pa bsnams par bsgom/ de nas 'og min gyi gnas nas 
75.2(1): dbyings kyi lha rnams spyan drangs nas/ spyi gtsug tu thim/ ye shes pa rnams thugs 
75.3(1): kar thim/ las kyi mkha' 'gro rnams lte bar thim/ sha zan rnams gsang bar thim 
75.4(1): par bsam la/ sngags 'di bzlas/ A+o~M badz+ra d+ha ki ni/ b+hud d+ha d+ha ki ni/ rad na d+ha 
75.5(1): ki ni/ pad ma d+ha ki ni/ karma d+ha ki ni/ yo ka d+ha ki ni/ yak+Sha d+ha ki ni/ rak+Sha d+ha ki ni/
75.6(1): dza hU~M bam ho/ zhes brjod do/ /mkha' 'gro gnad du gzud pa ni/ bdag mkha' 
75.7(1): 'gro gsal pa'i tsi t+ta'i nang du/ zla ba'i steng du ham dmar po zhig bsam/ hri hUM 
75.8(1): dkar po gnyis de la bstim la de la rig pa dar zhig gtad/ de las ye shes 'od 
75.9(1): zer rnam lnga yar 'phros te/ mig gnyis nas thon te/ mdun gyi rang snang la/ rtog 
75.10(1): med rang gsal la shes pa gtad do/ /snang ba mkha' 'gror bsgyur ba ni/ bdag 
75.11(1): gong gi mkha' 'gror gsal ba las/ mar me gcig las gcig chad pa'am/ bzhin 
75.12(1): las me long gi gzugs brnyan shar ba ltar/ snang srid thams cad mkha' 'gro dang 
75.13(1): rig 'dzin gyi snang ba/ sgra thams cad ni mkha' 'gro'i bstod pa/ mig gis cir 
75.14(1): mthong thams cad lha sku/ rna bar grags pa thams cad sngags dang bstod pa/ zas 
75.15(1): thams cad bdud rtsi'i ro mchog brgya dang ldan pa/ de ltar spyod lam dus thams 
75.16(1): cad du ma bral na/ mchog dang thun mong gi dngos grub chen po 'thob bo/ /gtor ma 
75.17(1): ni/ zhi ba'i gtor ma zlum por bca'/ rgyas pa'i gtor ma gru bzhir bca'/ dbang

75.21(1): mngar gsum mo/ /drag po dmar bag dmar nag sogs/ zhes mkha' 'gro rin chen 
76.1(1): phreng ba'i rgyud las/ gdams ngag bstan pa'i le'u ste so brgyad pa'o/ //
76.2(1): 7 ye shes mkha' 'gros mkha' bstsal pa/ dam tshig mkha' 'gro las sogs 
76.3(1): te/ phun sum 'tshogs pa'i 'khor rnams kun/ rtse gcig pa yi yid kyis nyon/ rjes 
76.4(1): 'jug tshad ldan shes pa dang / thabs dang shes rab gnyis bar nas/ mkha' spyod 
76.5(1): gnas su gshegs don du/ shes rab ye shes dbang 'di bskur/ dang po shes rab 
76.6(1): yum yang btsal/ thabs rol gdams ngag don yang bstan/ dang po shes rab 
76.7(1): yum btsal ba/ mtshan ldan bkra shis rigs brgyad de/ pad dung ri mo can dag 
76.8(1): dang / ba glang can dang lcug phran can/ sdong gcig mi rig phyal ba ma/ brgyad

78.18(1): pa bstan pa'i le'u ste bzhi bcu pa'o// //

160.19(1): par bstan pa'i skabs so// //
160.20(1): 7 kun rdzogs dpa' bos bka' bstsal pa/ kun mkhyen sprul sku las sogs te/

161.1(1): par bshad pa mtshan gyi don bstan pa/)rdzogs pa kun gyi spyi mes po/(mdor bstan pa/)lung

169.6(1): mnyam mtha' las 'das/ de ltar ma rtogs skye bo rnams/('og ma'i shed gcad pa dang /)
169.7(1): ma rtogs byis pa las kyis bcings/ log rtog mu stegs rtag chad gnyis/ phyogs 
169.8(1): rtogs theg pa rim pa brgyad/ phyogs med kun shar yang rtse nga /(lung 'di gzhan las khyad 
169.9(1): par 'phags pa bstan pa/)kun khyab rtsol 'das yang rtse nga / 'gag med rang shar yang 
169.10(1): rtse nga / bslu med don ston yang rtse nga / 'khrul med dbyings khyab yang rtse nga / snang 
169.11(1): srid thams cad nga yis byas/ lam 'bras thams cad nga yis bstan/ skyon yon 
169.12(1): thams cad nga yis bsal/ rgyu 'bras thams cad nga yis bsgrubs/ sku gsum zhing 
169.13(1): khams nga yis bstan/ lung mchog me long dgu 'dus lung /(thams cad lta ba'i don las 
169.14(1): ma 'das par dpe dang bcas pa/)dgung sngon mtho las thog babs pas/ gang la thogs 
169.15(1): chags med pa ltar/ cir snang thams cad lta ba'i don/ mthongs nas khri gdugs 
169.16(1): 'od shar bas/ mun pa thog babs yal ba ltar/ ye gsal chen po bsgom pa'i don/
169.17(1): skyin 'dang shwa chu lung brug pas/ rtsi shing sa rdo lhags pa ltar/ bde sdug rang sar 
169.18(1): lhags pa spyod pa'i don/ nor bu rin chen dbul rnyed pas/ dgos 'dod phun sum 
169.19(1): tshogs pa ltar/ cir snang sangs rgyas shar ba 'bras bu'i don/ nyon mongs sna tshogs 
169.20(1): byung ba dang / sku gsum rang la shar ba dus mnyam pa/ ma spangs ji bzhin nyi shar 
169.21(1): rdzogs chen don/ des na kun 'dus thabs kyi mdo/(mdo thabs su 'dus par bstan pa'o/)
170.1(1): snang ba ting 'dzin shar ba thabs kyi mdo/ ma bsgoms bde ba rgyas pa thabs kyi mdo/
170.2(1): gang shar rig par rgyas pa thabs kyi mdo/ sangs rgyas gzhan du mi tshol thabs kyi 
170.3(1): mdo/ 'khor bar lhung dogs med pa thabs kyi mdo/ sku gsum rang chas gnas 
170.4(1): pa thabs kyi mdo/ dgongs pa spyi blugs shar ba thabs kyi mdo/ zhes spyi rgyud ye khri 
170.5(1): mtha' sel las/ nam mkha' rtsol 'das chen por bstan pa'i le'u ste brgya dang bcu 
170.6(1): bzhi pa'o// //
170.7(1): 7 kun rdzogs dpa' bos bka' bstsal pa/(mdor bstan pa bka' bstsal pa/) kun 
170.8(1): mkhyen sprul sku las sogs te/ 'khor du 'dus pa'i rigs rnams nyon/ rgyud 'di 
170.9(1): nam mkha' gsal byed rgyud/(dbyings la mtshan bstan pa/)lung 'di rmad du byung ba'i 
170.10(1): lung / mdo 'di kun grol dgongs pa'i mdo/ bri gang (dbyings la )med pas nam 
170.11(1): mkha' 'dra/ mtha' dbus (dbyings la )med par kun tu bdal/ yangs dog med 
170.12(1): par kun la khyab/(bon skus/)skye med dbyings las skye bzhin du/(thams cad/)skye med 
170.13(1): (rig pa )klong las snang ba skyes/ skyes tsam nyid na rang bzhin med/(skye ma myong /)'byung 
170.14(1): chen nam mkha' skye med las/ cho 'phrul sna tshogs 'byung ba ltar/ bon nyid skye med 
170.15(1): klong nyid nas/ snang ba skye med 'gag med 'byung / sangs rgyas sems can dbye 
170.16(1): ru med/ bde sdug dbyer med bzang ngan med/ rgyu 'bras ye nas dbyer mi phyed/
170.17(1): bdag dang gzhan du dbyer mi phyed/ 'khor ba myang 'das dbyer mi phyed/ lus dang 
170.18(1): grib ma dbyer mi phyed/ chu zla mkha' zla dbyer mi phyed/ dper na chu bo sum 'dus 
170.19(1): sam/ bag phye'i gzugs ltar dbyer mi phyed/ chu dang 'o ma dbyer mi phyed/ des na 
170.20(1): rmad 'byung lung 'di la/(don rang las gzhan du mi btsal bar bstan pa/)kun gzhi rnam 
170.21(1): par shes pa sogs/ yong ye gdod nas rgya chad med/ bon nyid dbyings chen zab 
171.1(1): mo ru/ yong ye mkhas pas shes par gyis/ de las log par 'bras bu'am/ yong 
171.2(1): ye spangs nas tshol 'dod pa/ rin chen rnyed nas dbul pos kyang / yong ye sprang 
171.3(1): por 'khyams dang mtshungs/ dwa bu rgyal sar bton 'gyur nas/ yong ye dman sar 
171.4(1): babs dang mtshungs/ des na snang ba kun grol mdo/(mdo rig par dgrol ba/)sangs

171.6(1): grol ba'i mdo/ zhes spyi rgyud ye khri mtha' sel las/ nam mkha' gsal byed dbyer 
171.7(1): med kyi le'u ste brgya dang bco lnga pa'o// //
171.8(1): 7 kun rdzogs dpa' bos bka' bstsal pa/ kun mkhyen sprul sku las sogs te/
171.9(1): 'khor du 'dus pa'i tshogs rnams nyon/ rgyud 'di snying po klong phrugs rgyud/(mtshan 
171.10(1): bstan pa/)lung 'di yod med mtha' sel lung / mdo 'di ye shes rtsal rdzogs mdo/
171.11(1): dang po rdzogs don ngo sprad la/ khungs rgyud tshad ldan slob dpon des/ yul dag 
171.12(1): slob bu rkyen ldan la/ gsang ba bla med don sprad rigs/ 'byung ba lnga rdzogs don 
171.13(1): sprad rigs/ pha rol bcu rdzogs don sprad rigs/ rtag chad mtha' rdzogs don 
171.14(1): sprad rigs/ theg pa dgu rdzogs don sprad rigs/ snang ba kun rdzogs don sprad 
171.15(1): rigs/ rig pa byang chub sems nyid 'di/(('byung lnga rdzogs lugs bstan pa/)ji bzhin skye 
171.16(1): mched shar ba la/ 'byung ba chen po lnga yang rdzogs/ stong gsal kun la khyab pas 
171.17(1): nam mkha' rdzogs/ kun bskyed ('byung )gzhir gyur sa yang rdzogs/ bag chags 
171.18(1): (rtog pa'i )'khrud pas chu yang rdzogs/ mtshan ma (rnam rtog )sreg pas me yang rdzogs/
171.19(1): khyab byed kun (spyod pa )'degs rlung yang rdzogs/ 'di nyid snying po klong phrugs 
171.20(1): rgyud/('khor 'das rdzogs lugs bstan pa/)rdzogs chen nyid don rtogs 'dod na/ 'jig 
171.21(1): rten 'jig rten 'das pa rdzogs/ theg pa bon nyid yang rtse rdzogs/ yod pa'i mtha' 
172.1(1): dang med mtha' rdzogs/ lung 'di yod med mtha' sel lung / man ngag bshad du 
172.2(1): med par rdzogs/ don la (zab mo'i )bon spyod med de rdzogs/ bka' (bder gshegs )

172.4(1): sku la 'gyur ba med par rdzogs/(snying po ye shes/)stong pa las yul med par rdzogs/
172.5(1): bon skur yangs dog 'das te rdzogs/ bon nyid la rnam rtog med de rdzogs/ ma 
172.6(1): byas bon la spros tshig med de rdzogs/ mtha' 'das bsgom sgrub med de rdzogs/ ye 
172.7(1): shes (rang 'byung la/)rgya chad (bri gang )med de rdzogs/ dam tshig bsrung mtshams bral

172.9(1): 'di ye shes rtsal rdzogs mdo/(pha rol phyin cu rdzogs lugs bstan pa dang /)pha rol phyin bcu 
172.10(1): ngang gis rdzogs/ rnam par rtog pa yongs spangs te/ dngos dang mtshan mar 'dzin 
172.11(1): pa btang / ci la ma chags zhen med pas/ sbyin pa'i pha rol phyin pa rdzogs/ bon 
172.12(1): rnams skye 'gag med par rtogs/ nyon mongs cha 'phras gos pa med/ bsrung bya 
172.13(1): gnyen po rang dag pas/ tshul khrims pha rol phyin pa rdzogs/ yang dag don de nyon 
172.14(1): mongs bral/ bon nyid don la skrag sngangs med/ rtsod bral don la yangs dog med/
172.15(1): bzod pa'i pha rol phyin pa rdzogs/ bon nyid don las ma g.yos shing / rnam rtog 
172.16(1): dbang du de ma song / 'bral med don la bsgrub med gnas/ brtson 'grus pha rol 
172.17(1): phyin pa rdzogs/ zab mo'i don la rtse gcig gnas/ gtang bzhag med pa'i don dang 
172.18(1): ldan/ phyi nang bon rnams gcig tu 'dril/ bsam gtan pha rol phyin pa rdzogs/ go 
172.19(1): yul mtshon tshul dmigs su med/ dge sdig bzang ngan dmigs su med/ thob bya 
172.20(1): 'bras bu dmigs dang bral/ shes rab pha rol phyin pa rdzogs/ mi rtog rnam dag 
172.21(1): thabs su gyur/ thabs kyi pha rol phyin pa rdzogs/ rtsol bral (bsgribs pas/)rnam rtog 
173.1(1): mtshan ma 'joms/ stobs kyi pha rol phyin pa rdzogs/ smon zhing thob par bya ba'i yul 
173.2(1): mi dmigs/ smon lam pha rol phyin pa rdzogs/ thams cad (de nyid )mi rtog rtsol bral

173.4(1): rdzogs/ theg dgu'i don rnams 'dir rdzogs te/ spang bya'i dngos po rang grol bas/

173.7(1): 'dzin byed rang grol bas/ rang rtogs gshen rab theg pa rdzogs/ bden pa gnyis 
173.8(1): 'dod mi gcod cing / ngo bo gnyis 'dzin don las grol/ phyi nang gtan 'bebs

173.10(1): lha/ rang grol rje dang 'bangs mi blta/ rnam gsum mi dang lha las 'das/ g.yung 
173.11(1): drung sems dpa'i theg pa rdzogs/ ye nas rig pa lhar gsal bas/ lha bsgom kho na

179.17(1): las 'das pa dang / bsrung du med ces dam tshig dang / sa lam bgrod du med

179.21(1): ni/ 'bod skad kyis su bsdebs pa yin/ ngas bstan bzhin du shes par gyis/ zhes

197.3(1): dri ma brgyad spang pa/ khengs grags dge ba'i dri ma dang / dbang med snyad kyi dri ma 
197.4(1): dang / tshe 'di phan 'dod dri ma dang / byas pa lan re'i dri ma dang / gzhan spyod 
197.5(1): phrag dog dri ma dang / nga rgyal rloms sems dri ma dang / ma brtags spyad pa'i dri ma 
197.6(1): dang / sngar shor 'gyod sems dri ma'o/ /rkyen ngan grogs gyur gnyis yin te/ 'jig 
197.7(1): rten 'di rkyen grogs gyur dang / phyi ma'i rkyen ngan smon lam bzung / 'di yi rkyen ngan 
197.8(1): la yang gnyis/ bsgrub pa'i rkyen ngan grogs gyur dang / las gyur rkyen ngan grogs 
197.9(1): gyur pa'o/(gzhan gyi las ngan gyi rnam smin las sogs/)'khrul pa mi brtag rnam pa gsum/
197.10(1): spyir na sems can 'khrul mi brtag /dgos kyi dge mdzad 'khrul mi brtag /yang 
197.11(1): dgos slob dpon 'khrul mi brtag /'jig rten mi mthun spyod pa'o/(mtha' dag dang /)
197.12(1): lha mi gzhan brten rang rtogs dang / ma 'dres spyod pa gnyis yin/ dge ba ci dang 
197.13(1): ci byed pa/ dam pa gsum gyis zin par bya/ lung du ma bstan dge bar bsgyur/
197.14(1): las bsags sdig pa bgrang zhing bshags/ dge ba'i rtsa ba thams cad kun/ rdzogs 
197.15(1): pa'i g.yung drung mchog tu bsngo/ dam (gsum gyis par/)pas zin bya dbye na gnyis/
197.16(1): bsdus pa dang ni rgyas pa gnyis/ sbyor ba stong nyid dam pa'o/(bsdus pa/)dngos gzhi 
197.17(1): snying rje dam pa'o/ /rjes la g.yung drung mchog sems sogs/ rgyas par dbye na rnam 
197.18(1): pa gnyis/ stong nyid snying rje'i snying po can/ dngos gzhi pha rol phyin drug ldan/ rjes 
197.19(1): la rang bzhin med par shes/ lung du ma bstan shes pa rnams/(de ltar tshogs su bsgyur 
197.20(1): ba/)dge bar bsgyur ba bzhi yin te/ byed dgu tshogs su bsgyur ba dang / kha zas 
197.21(1): bdud rtsir bsgyur ba dang / nam zla don yod bsgyur ba dang /(dge ba'i bsam pa dang mi 
198.1(1): 'bral/)rgyu nyid sdom par gnas pa'o/ /theg pa 'og dang ma 'dres pa'o/ /zhes spyi rgyud 
198.2(1): ye khri mtha' sel las thun mong gi spyod pa bstan pa'i le'u ste brgya dang nyer brgyad 
198.3(1): pa'o// //
198.4(1): 7 bon sku kun tu bzang po yis/ rigs lnga las sogs 'khor tshogs la/
198.5(1): 'gag med klong nas bka' bstsal pa/ 'khor 'dus sprul pa rigs kyi tshogs/(rgyas 
198.6(1): pa/) khyad par phul phyung spyod pa ni/ nga yis khyod la bshad par bya/ rtse gcig pa yi 
198.7(1): yid kyis nyon/ kye ho khyad par spyod pa bstan pa la/(mdo tsam bstan pa/) dbye na rnam 
198.8(1): pa gnyis yin te/(rgyas pa/) rtogs pa phul phyung spyod pa dang / don ltar lam khyer 
198.9(1): spyod pa'o/ /phul phyung spyod pa gnyis yin te/(don lam khyer ba'i spyod pa rgyas par bstan pa/)
198.10(1): dbyer med tshul gyi phul phyung dang / nyon mongs med tshul phul phyung pa'o/ /dbye ba 
198.11(1): med pa'i don la gsum/ dus la dbyer med phul phyung dang / dngos po dbye ba 
198.12(1): med pa dang / sems can dbye ba med tshul lo/ /dus ni thun las sogs pa med/
198.13(1): chu bo rgyun gyi rnal 'byor ro/ /dngos ni dge sbyor phyogs gcig la/ blo gtad ma yin 
198.14(1): kun mi spang / sems can mi dbye kun don bsngo/ don dam dus su ma grub ste/ dus 
198.15(1): gsum gcig ste tha dad med/ dngos rnams bon nyid ngang du gcig /sangs rgyas 
198.16(1): sems can thams cad kun/ bon nyid g.yung drung snying po gcig /rtogs pa phul 
198.17(1): phyung spyod pa'o/ /don ltar lam du khyer ba yis/ spyod pa'i bye brag bstan pa bya/ blang 
198.18(1): dor med pa'i spyod pa ni/ spyad rgyu med par spyod pa'i mchog /bon nyid don gyi spyod 
198.19(1): pa ni/ mtshan ma med pa'i nam mkha' bzhin/ bon can mtshan mar mi blta bar/
198.20(1): rnal 'byor zag med shes rab kyis/ dngos med nam mkha' bzhin du spyad/ rang 
198.21(1): rig ye shes spyod pa ni/ dper na rin chen me long bzhin/ ye shes rang bzhin ma 
199.1(1): 'gag par/ rang shar chags sdang bral bar spyad/ lta ba don gyi spyod pa ni/ khyung 
199.2(1): chen nam mkhar lding ba bzhin/ bya bral lhun rdzogs chen por spyad/ dgongs pa 
199.3(1): don gyi spyod pa ni/ dper na chu bo gang gA bzhin/ rgyun med rnal 'byor chen por 
199.4(1): spyad/ 'bras bu don gyi spyod pa ni/ nyi ma 'od zer bcas pa bzhin/ sku gsum 'du 
199.5(1): bral med par spyad/ ma spangs lhun grub spyod pa ni/ dgongs pa ngang las ma yengs 
199.6(1): par/ shes rab chen po'i don la spyad/ rnal 'byor yid kyi spyod pa ni/ nam mkha' 
199.7(1): stong pa sprin dengs ltar/ dran snang rang yal don la spyad/ rnal 'byor ngag gi spyod 
199.8(1): pa ni/ dper na brag cha sgra sgrog ltar/ sgra rnams zhen pa med par spyad/ rnal 'byor 
199.9(1): lus kyi spyod pa ni/ dper na sgyu ma'i mkhan po ltar/ ci byed 'ching grol med par 
199.10(1): spyad/ lus ngag yid kyi spyod pa ni/ 'jig rten khams 'das bon 'di la/ dper 
199.11(1): na me long gzugs brnyan bzhin/ snang la zhen chags med par spyad/ dran pa med 
199.12(1): pa'i spyod pa ni/ dper na glang chen smyon pa bzhin/ rnal 'byor tshul 'chos med par 
199.13(1): spyad/ snang ba sun dbyung spyod pa ni/ bung bas me tog 'jib pa bzhin/ gcig tu 
199.14(1): zhen med gar bder spyad/ thugs rje chen po'i spyod pa ni/ dper na nyi ma'i snying po 
199.15(1): bzhin/ lus ngag yid gsum 'gro don ni/ bri bkol med par spyad par bya/ thugs 
199.16(1): rjes gdung ba'i spyod pa ni/ bu gcig pa yi ma bzhin du/ ci byed don gyi ngang du spyod/
199.17(1): gnyis su med pa'i spyod pa ni/ dper na gyad kyi nor bu ltar/ ched du mi 'gegs mi 
199.18(1): bsgrub spyad/ gang la mi rtog spyod pa ni/ bu chung bran bu'i spyod pa ltar/ ma bcos 
199.19(1): rang bzhin 'gag med spyad/ ces spyi rgyud ye khri mtha' sel las/ khyad par phul 
199.20(1): phyung gi spyod pa bstan pa'i le'u ste brgya dang nyer dgu pa'o/ /la thams cad yongs 
199.21(1): su zlo ba'i bam po las spyod pa'i don rgyas par bstan pa'i skabs so// //
200.1(1): 7 bon sku kun tu bzang po yis/ rigs lnga las sogs 'khor tshogs la/ 'gag 
200.2(1): med klong nas bka' bstsal pa/ kye ho theg pa rim dgur snang ba las/ ji ltar khyad 
200.3(1): par 'phags pa bshad/ ma rtogs log par rtog gnyis las/(mu stegs dang 'jig rten 
200.4(1): las lha mi 'phags lugs dang /)lha mi gzhan brten khyad par 'phags/ de yang ji ltar 
200.5(1): 'phags zhe na/ gang zag bdag med rtogs pas 'phags/ dge bcu rang don spyod 
200.6(1): pas 'phags/ bden bzhi sgo nas sgrub pa yis/ des na sgrub pa khyad par 'phags/
200.7(1): dgra bcom zhing dag las sogs te/ zung bzhi ya brgyad thob pas 'bras bu 'phags/
200.8(1): lha mi dag las rang rtogs 'phags pa yang /(de bas rang rtogs 'phags lugs/) gang 
200.9(1): zag bdag dang bon gyi bdag /phyogs 'ga' med rtogs lta ba 'phags/ dge bcu 
200.10(1): tshad mar bsrung steng du/ rdzu 'phrul ya ma zung 'ga' yis/ 'gro don shes mdzad 
200.11(1): spyod pa 'phags/ shes rgyud goms ba'i shugs dag gis/ sgrub pas sgrub pa khyad 
200.12(1): par 'phags/ ne tso bse ru lta bur gnas/ des na 'bras bu khyad par 'phags/
200.13(1): rang rtogs gshen rab theg pa bas/(thugs rje sems dpa' 'phags lugs dang /) thugs rje 
200.14(1): sems dpa' khyad par 'phags/ bdag med gnyis med rtogs pa yis/ des na lta 
200.15(1): ba khyad par 'phags/ tshad med rnam pa bzhi dag dang / bsdu ba rnam bzhis don 
200.16(1): mdzad pas/ des na spyod pa khyad par 'phags/ pha rol phyin bcu'i don sgrub pas/
200.17(1): des na sgrub pa khyad par 'phags/ kun tu 'od kyi sa non pas/ des na 'bras bu 
200.18(1): khyad par 'phags/ thugs rje sems pa'i theg pa bas/(de bas g.yung drung sems dpa' 
200.19(1): 'phags lugs/)g.yung drung sems dpa' khyad par 'phags/ don dam skye ba med par 
200.20(1): rtogs/ kun rdzob bdag dang ye shes lha/ rje 'bangs lta bas lta ba 'phags/ dag 
200.21(1): pa rnam gsum don spyad pas/ des na spyod pa khyad par 'phags/ rang rgyud lha la 
201.1(1): goms pa dang / byin rlabs sgo nas sgrub pa yis/ des na sgrub pa khyad par 'phags/
201.2(1): 'bras bu sku gsum thugs nyid kyis/ lha gsum thob pas 'bras bu 'phags/ g.yung 
201.3(1): drung sems dpa'i theg pa bas/ bya ba gtsang spyod 'phags pa yang /(bya ba gtsang spyod 
201.4(1): 'phags lugs/)lha bdag dpon g.yog tshul du blta/ des na lta ba khyad par 'phags/
201.5(1): mtshan ma yod dang med sgo nas/ 'gro don rgya lag phyad par mdzad/ des na spyod 
201.6(1): pa khyad par 'phags/ de kho na nyid bzhi'i sgo nas ni/ 'bras bu thob pas khyad par 
201.7(1): 'phags/ bya ba gtsang spyod theg pa bas/(de bas rnal ma kun ldan 'phags lugs/)rnal ma 
201.8(1): kun ldan khyad par 'phags/ kun rdzob lha dang grogs por blta/ des na lta ba khyad 
201.9(1): par 'phags/ phrin las rnam bzhi spyod pas na/ des na spyod pa khyad par 'phags/
201.10(1): phyag rgya rnam bzhi sgrub pa yis/ des na sgrub pa khyad par 'phags/ rigs bzhi 
201.11(1): sangs rgyas nyid grub pas/ grub pa'i 'bras bu khyad par 'phags/ rnal ma kun ldan 
201.12(1): theg pa bas/(de bas dngos bskyed thugs rje rol pa 'phags lugs/)dngos bskyed thugs rje'i 
201.13(1): theg pa 'phags/ khyad par rnam pa bzhis 'phags te/ rang lus rgyal ba'i dkyil 
201.14(1): 'khor blta/ des na lta ba khyad par 'phags/ sbyor sgrol gnyis kyi 'gro don mdzad/
201.15(1): des na spyod pa khyad par 'phags/ thabs dang shes rab sgo nas sgrub/ des na sgrub 
201.16(1): pa khyad par 'phags/ kun tu 'od kyi sa thob pas/ des na 'bras bu khyad par 
201.17(1): 'phags/ dngos bskyed thugs rje'i theg pa bas/(dngos bskyed bas shin tu don ldan 'phags 
201.18(1): lugs/) shin tu don ldan bzhi yis 'phags/ dbyings dang ye shes gnyis med rtogs/
201.19(1): des na lta ba khyad par 'phags/ dbyings kyi ye shes dag la spyod/ ye shes longs 
201.20(1): spyod dbyings la spyod/ des na spyod pa khyad par 'phags/ phung po lnga dang 'byung 
201.21(1): ba lnga/ rigs lnga yab yum lhar sgrub pas/ des na sgrub pa khyad par 'phags/ ma 
202.1(1): chags pad ma spyan sa thob/ des na 'bras bu khyad par 'phags/ shin tu don ldan 
202.2(1): theg pa bas/ yang rtse bla med bzhis 'phags te/ snang srid thams cad bon skur 
202.3(1): blta/ des na lta ba khyad par 'phags/ ji bzhin skye mched sgo nas 'gro don mdzad/
202.4(1): des na spyod pa khyad par 'phags/ bya btsal med pa'i don sgrub pas/ des na sgrub 
202.5(1): pa khyad par 'phags/ bcu gsum 'khor lo tshogs chen nas/ nyi shu rtsa gcig sa 
202.6(1): non pas/ des na 'bras bu khyad par 'phags/ kye ma don ldan rigs kyi bu/ ngas 
202.7(1): bstan rgyud lung thams cad du/ 'phags pa dang ni spags pa dang / che dang chung 
202.8(1): dang sbyor byed dang / gong 'og shan 'byed gang byung pa/ 'dir bshad bzhin du shes 
202.9(1): par gyis/ zhes spyi rgyud ye khri mtha' sel las/ theg pa brgyad kyi 'phags lugs

202.21(1): yi don bstan pa/ khyad 'phags don ltar shes par bya/ theg pa thams cad mthar

203.10(1): ba zhes pa'i tshig rnams dang / / grub mtha' zhes su btags pa dang / yang dag

203.12(1): gang byung yang / lta ba mtshon pa'i tshig bsdus pa/ so so'i gnas skabs shes par bya/
203.13(1): gzung 'dzin gnyis kyi don brjod na/(theg dgu lta ba'i rim pa bstan pa'o/)lha mi gzhan

225.9(1): ba'o/ /don ni gdod nas gnas pa'o/ /rang bzhin 'gyur ba med pa ste/ g.yung drung

225.20(1): 7 bon sku kun tu bzang po yis/ rigs lnga las sogs 'khor tshogs la/ 'gag 
225.21(1): med klong nas bka' bstsal pa/ phyi nang 'dus pa'i 'khor tshogs rnams/ theg dgu
