490.5(1): gyi ngo sprod gsal bar bstan pa/ ka ra 'khyor zhug man ngag gis gnas lugs rang 
490.6(1): gsal du ngo sprad de/ 'gro ba'i mgon po'i zhal las shes so/ /gsum pa yid ches 
490.7(1): par byed pa'i rtags kyi ngo sprod ni/ rgyang zhags chu'i sgron ma las/ rtags kyi ye shes 
490.8(1): tshon gang par 'chang ba ni/ bon sku snying la yod pa'i don ni/ snying zur gsum du 
490.9(1): 'dug pa ni/ sku gsum 'du 'bral med pa'i don ni/ khog pa stong par gnas pa ni/
490.10(1): bon sku stong par gnas pa'i rtags so/ /tsi ta rtsa ba na snying tshil dkar por chags 
490.11(1): pa nyi ma'i gdan/ snying rtse mor gnas pa ni/ zla ba'i gdan/ nyi ma dang zla ba'i 
490.12(1): dbu' brgyan bya ste/ thabs dang shes rab 'du 'bral med pa'i bon/ rtags rten la 
490.13(1): shar ba'o/ /ye shes kyi 'char sgo dang ldan pa zhes bya ste/ snying dang mig du 'brel pa'i 
490.14(1): rtsa cig yod de/ rtsa'i rgyal po shel gyi sbu gu can zhes kyang bya/ g.yung drung dpa' bo 
490.15(1): gseb lam zhes kyang bya/ thugs rje rgyun gyi thag pa zhes kyang bya/ de lta bu'i rtsa gcig 
490.16(1): snang rung na med kyang 'byung rung na lhun gyis grub nas gnas so/ /des na bon sku 
490.17(1): snying la yod pa'i rtag mig la song pa ste/ rtags kyi ye shes ni/ khra tshang kha ma lta bu'i 
490.18(1): sems dang / nang rten dang phyi snod kyi bye brag dang / mig dang snying du 'brel pa'o/ /
490.19(1): de gnyis med kyis lam de na lha khang gi sgo rtsa 'od bya phod tsam cig 'dug /de lta 
490.20(1): bas lha khang gi rtse mo mthong / der nges shes skyes/ 'khor gsum yongs su dag par 
490.21(1): byas/ gangs dkar shel gyi brag phug du song pas dgongs pa la drug dang snga skad 
491.1(1): cig ces kyang sbyar ro/ /des na bon sku snying la yod pa'i rtags/ mig la yod pa'o/ /
491.2(1): de ltar tsi ta rin po che'i gzhal yas na/ dngas ma ye shes lnga ldan la/ rang bzhin 
491.3(1): 'dus ma byas pa de nyid ni/ 'dra 'bag sgo lnga rang gsal gyis/ rtag dang 'char 
491.4(1): sgo'i ngo sprod ni bla ma de'i zhal las shes so/ /gnyis pa yul de ni sku mi bzhugs na 
491.5(1): lung pa stong pa dang 'dra bas/ sku'i ngo sprod bstan ste/ de la gsum ste/ bon sku la 
491.6(1): ngo sprad pa dang / longs sku la ngo sprad pa dang / sprul sku la ngo sprad pa'o/ /dang po la 
491.7(1): gsum/ ma thog du bu ngo sprad pa dang / bu thog du ma ngo sprod pa dang / ma bu so ru 
491.8(1): bzhag pa'o/ /de la ma thog du bu ngo sprad pa ni/ dpe'i ngo sprod kyis ngo shes par bya/
491.9(1): rtags kyi ngo sprod kyis yid ches par bya/ don gyi ngo sprod kyis thag chod par bya/ de 
491.10(1): ltar dpe don rtag gsum don gnyis med bzhi las yid ches par bya/ de la sku 
491.11(1): gsum du ngo sprod pa ste/ khyad par bon sku ngos bzung ngo sprad pa ni/ sangs rgyas bzhi 
491.12(1): rdzogs ngo sprod pa'i rdzas chen te/ mtshan mo nyi ma'i phyogs nas lta/ g.yas zur shes 
491.13(1): rab drug bzhag yin/ bdud rtsi lce'i don sbyar na/ rig pa'i khu byug tshig cig gis/
491.14(1): 'gro ba'i mgon po'i zhal las shes/ de ltar bla ma sangs rgyas kyi dngos po yin/
491.15(1): tshul cig 'char ste snang la rang bzhin med/ ma 'dres la yongs su rgyas la/ gnyis 
491.16(1): 'dzin med pa cig 'dzin dang bcas ste sal le/ sdug bsngal med pa bde' ba dang 
491.17(1): bcas te yar re/ gzhan snang med pa rang snang bcas te song nge / gzhan spros med 
491.18(1): pa rang spros dang bcas te khrol le/ ma rig pa sangs la rig pa dang bcas te hrig 
491.19(1): ge/ bon sku la gting gsal gyi bkrag /rig pa la ye shes kyi gdangs/ sgo lnga rnam 
491.20(1): shes yi sale ba/ yid kyi 'dzin pa ma zhugs shing / gting gsal don la gnas 
491.21(1): 'gyur na/ 'a'adi ni bzhag thabs dam pa yin/ de ltar rig pa dang 'od gsal 
492.1(1): gnyis med du 'khyer shes tsam na shar tshad lta ba/ rig pa rang grol 'gyur tshad ye 
492.2(1): shes/ dran tshad bsgom pa/ phyi snang stong du shes pas rtog pa'i rten zhig pa yin/
492.3(1): nang rig stong du shes pas nyon mongs pa'i rgya ral/ snang 'dzin shes pa rang sar 
492.4(1): grol/ blo snang zhig /'dzin snang khrol rang ngo shes/ gdangs dang bcas nas sangs 
492.5(1): rgyas/ bdag don du bon sku thob nas gzhan don du gzugs sku rnam pa gnyis kyis 
492.6(1): don byed do/ /gnyis pa bu thog du ma ngo sprad pa ni/ lus ngag yid gsum mo/ /lus 
492.7(1): la yang gsum ste/ bon sku rjen pa la mtshan ma rten mi bca'/ rang lus so ma la 
492.8(1): dgye dgu' mi bya/ rkyang zhag chu'i sgron mar/ me rlung gi g.yab mo mi g.yab pa dang 
492.9(1): gsum mo/ /ngag la ngo sprod cig /rgyal po rmangs su bab na seng g+he'i nga ro bsgrags/
492.10(1): phyi'i nga ro bsgrags/ nang gi nga ro bsgrags/ gsang pa'i nga ro bsgrags/ nyams myong 
492.11(1): gis nga ro bsgrags/ yid la gsum te/ shes pa'i rgya bskyed la lta ba thog babs su 
492.12(1): bstan pa'i ngo sprad dang cig /gzung 'dzin bcud la bor ba 'od gsal gnad du 
492.13(1): btang pa'i ngo sprod dang gnyis/ rnam shes yul la 'phro na rlung rig gnad du bzung 
492.14(1): pa'i ngo sprod dang gsum rgyas par bla ma'i zhal las shes/ gsum pa ma bu so ru 
492.15(1): bzhag pa'i ngo sprod ni/ ngo shes thag chod so sor rang lhan gyis sdod pa dang 'dra bar 
492.16(1): ma bu rang sor bzhag la ngo sprad do/ /de gnyis gzigs pa'i spyan gsum dang / grol 
492.17(1): ba'i dgongs pa gsungs so/ /shes rab kyi spyan gyis phyi snang ba la gzigs pas snang 
492.18(1): ba zil gyi gnon/ snang pa rang grol du grol bas phyi'i snang pa ngo 'phrod do/ /bon nyid 
492.19(1): kyi spyan gyis soms nyid la gzigs pas/ rnam rtog zil gyi gnan te/ bon sku 'od 
492.20(1): gsal du grol bas na blo la ngo 'phrod/ ye shes kyi bar do nyams myong la gzigs 
492.21(1): pas bag chags zil gyi nan te/ rang snang dbyer med du grol bas gsang pa 
493.1(1): dgongs pa la ngo 'phrod do/ /rting gsal gyi steng du 'dzin med du grol/ blo bral gyi 
493.2(1): steng du rang grol du grol/ bcos med kyi steng du gnas lugs su grol pa'o/ /gnyis 
493.3(1): pa nang gsal ba longs sku la ngo sprad pa ste/ men shel de nyid rkyen med de/ rang 
493.4(1): gsal du gnas pa dang 'dra bas/ bon dag pa zang thal gyi nang nas shes rab 
493.5(1): longs spyod rdzogs pa'i sku lnga ye shes lnga'i bdag nyid du gnas/ de la ye shes sbyar 
493.6(1): na stong pa nyid kyi ye shes/ de'i rang gdangs kha dog mthing khar gsal ba/ de'i 
493.7(1): 'bras bu gzugs su shar ba'i sku/ kun snang khyab pa bon nyid mi 'gyur ba'i rtags 
493.8(1): su sku mdog mthing kha/ don gyi dgongs pa skye ba med pa'i rtags su byang chub mchog 
493.9(1): gi phyag rgya can/ thugs rigs ye shes kyi gcod pa'i brdar phyag na 'khor lo/ thabs 
493.10(1): shes rab 'du 'bral med pa'i brda' ru yum nam mkha'i lha mo dang gnyis su med du 
493.11(1): 'du 'bral med par gnas pa'o/ /mtshan bzang po sum bcu' dang dpe byad 
493.12(1): bzang po brgyad bcus brgyan pa'o/ /bdan rtsal gsum rdzogs pa seng g+he'i bdan 
493.13(1): la bzhugs la/ nyon mongs pa'i skyon gyi ma gos pa'i brda' ru pad ma'i bdan/
493.14(1): thabs shes rab gnyis su med pa nyi zla'i bdan la bzhugs pa'o/ /'khor ni rigs 
493.15(1): bzhi'i sangs rgyas kyis bkor te tshom bu cig pa'i dal du gsal lo/ /ye nas gsal 
493.16(1): ba me long lta bu'i ye shes/ de'i rang gdangs kha dog dkar por gsal/ de'i 
493.17(1): 'bras bu gzugs su shar ba'i sku gsal ba rang 'byung / bon nyid dri ma med pa'i 
493.18(1): brda' ru sku mdog dkar po/ yongs su non cing rdzogs pa'i brda' ru sa gnon gyi 
493.19(1): phyag rgya can/ 'gyur ba med pa'i brda' ru phyag na g.yung drung / thabs shes 'du 
493.20(1): 'bral med pa'i brda' yum/ 'gyur ba med pa'i brda' gdan glang po che/ mnyam pa 
493.21(1): nyid/ so sor rtogs pa/ bya ba nan tan ye shes lnga/ de'i gdangs kyi 'od lnga rang 
494.1(1): shar ba/ de'i bcud las/ dper na bon sku lta bu ru gsal te/ longs spyod rdzogs 
494.2(1): pa'i sku la ngo sprad pa ni/ sangs rgyas sku lngar shar ba yang gdul bya'i don la ma nges 
494.3(1): sna tshogs su sprul nas 'gro don mdzad/ de la rig pa sna tshogs su shar ba des/
494.4(1): 'od zer gyi gra ba'am/ bu ga du ma dang ldan pa'i bum pa la gsal ba'i sgron me 
494.5(1): btegs pa la ngo sprad de/ lag len bla ma'i zhal las shes so/ /gsum pa sku la/ ye 
494.6(1): shes mi bzhugs na dag pa'i 'od zer so dang 'dra bas/ mkhyen pa'i ye shes kyi ngo 
494.7(1): sprod ston no/ /de la don gnyis ste/ dbye ba dang / ngo sprod bstan pa'o/ /dbye ba la 
494.8(1): gnyis/ ngos bzung pa dang / dbye ba dngos so/ /de la dbyings dang ye shes gnyis 
494.9(1): 'dzoms dgos ste/ ma 'dzoms na dbyings gnyis kyis gral du 'gro bas gnas pa'i 
494.10(1): yul gdan la dbab ste/ dpe' don rtags kyi ngo sprad pa ni/ dbyings las sku dang 
494.11(1): ye shes gnyis med zung 'brel lo/ /de la dpe' mtshon na dbyings las ye shes kyis 
494.12(1): brgyan pa'i dpe'/ g.yu'i ma 'dal la gser gyi tshom bu bkod pa dang / ye shes la 
494.13(1): dbyings kyis brgyan pa'i dpe'/ g.yu' la gser gyis spras pa dang 'dra/ ye shes la 
494.14(1): thugs rjes brgyan pa'i dpe'/ nyi ma'i snying po dang / zer lta bu'i ye gnas lugs 
494.15(1): kyi don shes rig pa'i ye shes lnga nges bya ba grangs nges pa'o/ /gnyis pa dbye ba 
494.16(1): dngos la gnyis ste/ sems kyis sangs mi rgya bar bstan pa dang / khyad par 
494.17(1): bzhags pa'o/ /sems kyis sangs mi rgya ste/ sems bag chags bsags pa'i gzhi' 
494.18(1): med par 'dod pa ni gdam ngag nas sems kyis sangs rgyas mi 'dod/ 'dzin pa 
494.19(1): blo dang bral lo/ /snang ba bon skur mi 'dod mtshan ma rang sar grol/ 'dzin pa 
494.20(1): bskyed par mi 'dod 'od gsal nang nas bskyed/ bsam dngos lta bar mi 'dod 
494.21(1): snang srid gzhi' 'don/ kun gzhi 'bras bu bon skur gtan la phobs/ sems la 
495.1(1): sems kyis lta bas lta rgyu ci yang med/ de bzhin sems la sangs rgyas rang bzhin bya 
495.2(1): sgro rlung khyer 'dra/ ces so/ /yang de nyid mu nas/ rnal 'byor stong pa'i lam la 
495.3(1): gnas pa ni/ mu steg chad pa'i lam dang ci ma 'dra/ nga la btud na mngon par 
495.4(1): sangs rgyas so ces so/ /de na 'di'i lugs kyi lta phug stong pa la mi gtad/ dus phyi 
495.5(1): ma la mi 'debs/ 'bras bu gzhan nas mi tshol ba'o/ /gnyis pa khyad par bzhag pa 
495.6(1): la bdun ste/ gnas/ lam/ sgo/ ngo bo/ /rtsal/ las/ phan yon no/ /de la gnas kyi 
495.7(1): khyad par ni/ sems kyi gnas glo ba yin/ ye shes kyi gnas ni snying la yod pa'o/ /
495.8(1): de la yul rlung can kyi grong khyer blon po kun med snang ba/ yul pad ma'i mdog 
495.9(1): gsal na/ rgyal po nor bu dri med ces bshad do/ /gnyis pa lam gyi khyad par ni/
495.10(1): sems kyi lam ni ol kong dang med pa'o/ /ye shes kyi lam ni rtsa'i rgyal po shel sbu gu 
495.11(1): can zhes bya ste/ snying dang mig du 'brel pa'i rtsa cig yod/ ye shes kyi lam mo/ /
495.12(1): gsum pa sgo'i khyad par ni/ sems kyi sgo ni kha sna gnyis/ ye shes kyi sgo ni mig /bzhi 
495.13(1): pa ngo bo'i khyad par ni/ sems kyi ngo bo ma rig pa/ ye shes kyi ngo bo gsal mi rtog 
495.14(1): pa'o/ /lnga pa rtsal du khyad par ni/ sems kyi rtsal ni chags sdang lnga/ ye shes kyi rtsal 
495.15(1): ni sku gsum rang shar 'dzin pa med pa'o/ /drug pa las kyi khyad par ni/ sems kyi 
495.16(1): las ni yin men gyi gzung 'dzin sna tshogs su rgyu'o/ /ye shes kyi las ni 'dzam gling 
495.17(1): bye ba phrag brgya/ sprul pa'i sku bye ba phrag brgya bkye' nas 'gro ba sems can gyi don 
495.18(1): byed pa'o/ /bdun pa phan yon so so'i sgo nas khyad par bzhag pa ni/ sems kyi 
495.19(1): dbugs kyi rta po la/ sems kyi mi po zhon nas/ rlung sems 'dres pa'i yid/ rnam 
495.20(1): par rtog pa dza lang lang 'gyu/ de rnam rtog 'gos su 'bru bskyed/ bag chags 'og 
495.21(1): tu 'bras bu sogs/ 'khor bar skye ba'i rgyu ru song ste/ des na sems ni dbugs 
496.1(1): dang bcas pa bzung / 'dzin can cig yin la/ ye shes ni dbugs med zang thal 
496.2(1): cig yin pa'o/ /sems ni blo dang bcas pa cig yin pa'o/ /ye shes ni blo bral chen 
496.3(1): po cig yin pa'o/ /sems ni rtog pa dang bcas pa cig yin la/ ye shes ni rtog 
496.4(1): med chen po cig yin pa'o/ /ye shes chen po de sngar yang rtog bcas su 'char ma 
496.5(1): myong / phyis kyang rtogs bcas su 'char mi bsrid/ sems ni skad cig ma brgya' ste/
496.6(1): brgya' 'gag can yin la/ ye shes ni skye 'gag med pa cig yin pa'o/ /ye shes skye 
496.7(1): 'gag can cig yin na/ thugs pa med pa'i skyon yong pa'o/ /sems ni blo bur pa 
496.8(1): cig yin la/ ye shes ni rgyun pa cig yin pa'o/ /sems ni sdug bsngal dang bcas 
496.9(1): pa cig yin la/ ye shes ni bde' ba chen po'o/ /hril dril pas soms gang yang med 
496.10(1): pa cig ye shes yin la/ ye shes gang yang med pa cig sems yin pa'o/ /sems 
496.11(1): dang ye shes phyed ma phyed ni grol ma grol yin no/ /sems dang ye shes rnam pa gnyis 
496.12(1): cig kyang men tha dad kyang men pa ste/ dbye' rab du dka' ba'i bon/ ye shes 
496.13(1): gzhi' ma sems yin te/ cig pa dang ni tha dad las/ grol ba dang ni ma grol ba/
496.14(1): grol pa dag ni ye shes te/ ma grol ba ni sems su 'dod/ gnyis pa ngo sprod la 
496.15(1): gnyis te/ spyi las khyad par gyi bye brag ngos bzung pa dang / skal ldan rgyud la 
496.16(1): dbab pa'o/ /de la thog pa spyi'i lugs kyis bshad pa la gdam ngag du byed de/
496.17(1): sangs rgyas lag 'chang 'di'i lugs kyi bshad pa la bshad pa rang du byed/ gdam 
496.18(1): ngag rang la rang du 'deb ste// bla mas bstan du 'dod/ slob mas go ba 'dod/
496.19(1): shes shing rtog par 'dod/ grol zhing sangs rgyas par 'dod/ de la bla mas brda' 
496.20(1): mig gi yul du bstan/ ngag rna ba'i dbang po blug /brda' dang ngag du 'dzom 
496.21(1): dgos/ brda' dang ngag du ma 'dzoms na/ spyi 'dzom blo'i yul du las nas don 
497.1(1): rang gi mtshan nyid gtan la mi pheb/ dper na stag gzig lo rgyus bshad pa dang 
497.2(1): 'dra/ gdam ngag yin zer nas mngon gsum du gtan la dbab du med/ rjes 
497.3(1): dpag du bshad pa byed de/ des phan pas 'di bshad pa la bshad pa rang du byed/
497.4(1): gdam ngag la gdam ngag rang du 'debs so/ /gdam ngag zab na dbang po tha ma 
497.5(1): la yang sangs rgyas/ gdam ngag mi zab na rab yin kyang 'khor bar 'khyams/ de 
497.6(1): ci'i phyir/ sems la bltas pas dngos su mthong / da lta phug stong pa la gtad/ ye 
497.7(1): shes dbyings su stor/ 'bras bu log myos pa'i phung por tol gyis 'khrul/ gdam 
497.8(1): ngag zab nan tar na/ nad pa dbang po sa le ba cig la btab nas thebs/ bar do 
497.9(1): nas sangs rgyas thams cad dur sa cig /gdam ngag ni bstan pa tsam gyis chog /
497.10(1): bltas na bltas pa tsam gyis mthong / shes na shes pa tsam gyis grol/ dus de nyid du 
497.11(1): mngon sangs rgyas/ 'bras bu ni lhun gyis grub/ gnyis pa skal ldan gyi brgyud la 
497.12(1): dbab pa ni/ dpe' rin po che'i man shel yin/ rtag mig la 'char ba yin/ don 
497.13(1): rang lus bon skur gtan la 'bebs tsam na/ shel nang gi 'od lnga lta bu ni sku dang 
497.14(1): ye shes dbyer med pa'i stong nyid me long lta bu bya ba nan tan mnyam pa nyid kyi ye 
497.15(1): shes lnga po ni gzhi' gnas kyi ye shes lnga'o/ /ye shes chen po de gdangs lnga dang ldan 
497.16(1): pa'i rtags su/ mtshan nyid 'dzin pa'i ye shes lnga bya ba kha dog lngar gsal te/ stong 
497.17(1): pa nyid kyi ye gdangs ni/ bon nyid klong nas mthing khar shar/ ces sbyar ro/ /hril 
497.18(1): hril dril na gzhir gnas kyi ye shes lnga ni me long lta bu lnga'i mtshan nyid 'dzin pa'i 
497.19(1): ye shes lnga ni/ gzhi' gnas kyi ye shes lnga'i gdangs 'od gdangs lngar shar ba'o/ /
497.20(1): ngo sprad lugs bon sku'i dus kyi ngo sprod lugs lta bu ste/ mtshan nyid ye shes rnam lnga 
497.21(1): yid ches don gyi gdam ngag ste/ 'gro ba'i mgon po'i zhal las shes/ de ltar yul 
498.1(1): bon gyi dbyings kyi ngo sprod kyis yul la mtho' dman med par rtogs/ bon sku'i ngo 
498.2(1): sprod kyis rtog pa med par rtogs/ 'dir ye shes kyi ngo sprod kyis/ thugs gsal ba'i 
498.3(1): ye shes chen por rtogs/ 'dir mtho' dman med pa'i yul/ gdos pa med pa'i sku/
498.4(1): sems med pa'i ting nge 'dzin zhes bya'o/ /bdag med sku ni ston par che/ rang rig 
498.5(1): ye shes bstan par che/ srog med sku la 'khor du che/ ma bris de la gnas su che/ ye 
498.6(1): nas lhun grub dus su che/ che ba lnga'i khyad par bstan/ ces dang / phyi stong nang stong 
498.7(1): stong pa'i don dang 'phrad/ phyi gsal nang gsal gsal ba rang la shar/ phyi rig 
498.8(1): nang rig rig pa rgyun chad med/ dus ma yin par snang ba 'gyur/ lus ma 'phos 
498.9(1): par tshe 'phos/ dbugs ma chad par bon sku'i bden pa mthong pa'o/ /de don 
498.10(1): gnyis pa nyams su blang pa la gnyis te/ gsal ba bde' chen gyi gdam ngag gis 
498.11(1): 'od gsal nyams su blang pa dang / ye shes bskyel bsu'i gdam ngag gis 'pho ba 
498.12(1): bya'o/ /dang po la gnyis/ dpe' gsum gyis mtshon te nyams su blang pa dang / zang 
498.13(1): thal gsum gyis rig pa rten dang bral bar bstan pa'o/ /de la dang po men shel la 
498.14(1): rten de dpe' rang snang du chod par bya/ me sgra dang chu sgra rang snang du chod par bya/
498.15(1): nyi zer gyi dra ba'am 'gar gyi zhun ma la rten te zer chod par bya'o/ /de yang shes la 
498.16(1): rton te bla mas ngo sprad pa bzhin du nyams su blang ste/ dben pa nyams dga'i dgon 
498.17(1): pa ru/ bde' ba'i stan la 'dug byas la/ sems la gnod pa'i tsher ma kun spangs 
498.18(1): te/ rig pa phyir 'gyu na 'od kyi 'khor lo brten te yig 'bru gsum gyi dmar khrid 
498.19(1): dang / 'od gsal 'khor lo rang rkyang la nyams su blang / snang ba dang 'od gsal 
498.20(1): dbyer med du nyams su 'char/ nang du 'gyu' na tsi ta rin po che'i gzhal yas su 
498.21(1): 'od kyi gru gu rma bya'i gsal sgong lta bu la gtad la nyams su blang / shes pa 'od 
499.1(1): gsal du 'char ba'i nyams su skye/ de yang gang zag tha ma 'bring gi don du byas 
499.2(1): pa'o/ /bla che ba rngam la zang thal du nyams su blang te/ 'og du rgyas par 'chad do/ /
499.3(1): da ni me chu rlung sgra la brten ste nyams su blang lugs ni/ rig pa sgra la gtad de 
499.4(1): nyams su blang pas/ dang rig pa dbyer med du shes/ mthug du bar dor sgra la mi 
499.5(1): 'jig pa'o/ /nyi zer gyi dra ba lta bu'am/ zhun mkhan gyi sa lam lta bu la rig pa 
499.6(1): gcun te bsgom/ zar la nyams su blangs pas bar dor zer la mi 'jig pa'o/ /
499.7(1): gnyis pa zangs thal gyis rig pa rten dang dbral ba ni gnyis/ spyi dang bye brag gis 
499.8(1): ngo bo ngos bzung ste bstan pa dang blang lugs dngos so/ /de la dang po ni/ theg 
499.9(1): chen dang theg chung / drang don dang nges don/ sngags dang mtshan nyid/ gang zag 
499.10(1): gi rab 'bring kun gyi spyi dang spyis ru/ gnas lugs dus su myongs/ bon sku kun tu 
499.11(1): khyab/ rkyen tha dad du rgyu rkyen sna tshogs su shar bas lus so sor blang / bde' sdug 
499.12(1): so sor rang re re yod/ gser gyi rgya mdud na lta/ khom rig mi che ste/ bon sku rig 
499.13(1): pa yin/ rig med bon dbyings nam mkha' med/ sangs pa yod de rgyas pa med/
499.14(1): nyon mongs sangs/ ye shes med/ nag po la bon sku'i mtshan nyid med do/ /ma shes 
499.15(1): pa lta bu/ kun gzhi'i spyi sa/ byed pa la dgos ste 'di skad zer/ dge' ba byas kyang 
499.16(1): phan med zer/ sdig pa byas kyang gnod med zer/ lan chags 'phral la mi 'ong 
499.17(1): zer/ yong na lus la yong ngam sems la yong / lus la yong na rdo dang 'dra/
499.18(1): sems la yongs na nam mkha' 'dra'o/ /de skad zer ba'i rnal 'byor de/ lce la zhing 
499.19(1): rmo sdug bsngal rab du sbyongs/ bon sku stong par 'dod pa'i lta ba de dbyings su gol/
499.20(1): ra rog phag rog zer/ spyod pa bab chol byed/ dge' med sdig med kyi lta bar 
499.21(1): songs/ skal pa dang ldan pas 'ga' tsam las thar dka' 'o/ /blos byas kyi stong pa 
500.1(1): bsgom kyang gol/ lha khang gi ri mo legs kyang 'jig zhes so/ /de ltar du mi 'dod 
500.2(1): ste/ sems kyi rang bzhin 'di gsal bar 'dod de/ ye shes lnga ltar 'dus ma byas 
500.3(1): pa yi/ de nyid stong pa 'di gsal gyi snying po can/ mar me'i snying po 'od du gnas 
500.4(1): pa bzhin/ rang rig ye shes 'od kyi gdangs la bzhugs/ ces pa'o/ /de ni gzhan 
500.5(1): mi gsal ba rang gsal/ de la gzhan med de rang la yod/ yang dag par rdzogs 
500.6(1): pa'i sangs rgyas gnyis 'dzin med de 'dzin can ces so/ /gnyis pa blang lugs 
500.7(1): dngos ni/ gnas pa de ltar du gnas kyang / skal ldan blo rab gang zhig gis/ de ci 
500.8(1): ltar nyams su len zhes na/ de ltar mi len te/ de ltar blang na skyon cig yod de/
500.9(1): cig nang na cig yod par bsgom na/ rtog pa nyid 'khrul gyi bsgom du yang 'gro/ mu 
500.10(1): steg rga pa'i bar yang 'gro/ de bas kyang bag chags kyi lus la bon sku gsal bar 
500.11(1): 'dod na/ lus kyi 'khri ba mi chod/ lus kyi 'khri ba ma chod na sems gnad pas lus 
500.12(1): gnad gal che/ de ji ltar/ sdug bsngal thams cad lus kyis bsgyur ro/ /nyams 
500.13(1): byed kyi lus bsgom pas/ ltogs khyag drang legs so/ /btso' bsregs 'ong / bar do 
500.14(1): 'jigs skrag der/ skyabs brtsal na sdug bsngal du 'gro/ des na snyam byed lus 
500.15(1): dang bsgom blo'i 'du shes phyad kyis btang la/ zang thal gsum du nyams su len ste/
500.16(1): ma bon nyid dbyings kyi snang ba sgrib med zang thal lta bu/ bon sku dag pa zang thal 
500.17(1): nyams su len pa'i rig pa ye shes zang thal du bon sku gting gsal gyi ngang la shes 
500.18(1): pa 'dzin med du rjen ne bzhag la bsgom/ lus stong pa la yin te/ ltos med kyi 
500.19(1): stong pa zang thal/ dpe' rgya mtsho' yang zang thal/ nyi zla skar yang zang thal/ zang 
500.20(1): thal gyi klong na zang thal du gnas/ yul bon nyid dbyings la bon dbyings dag 
500.21(1): pa'i ye shes gtang / bon sku la gtigs gsal gyi bkrag /rig pa la 'od gsal gyi 
501.1(1): gdangs/ dper na nyi zer lta bu de ka la bon sku gsal ba'i sbub zhes bya'o/ /gdam 
501.2(1): ngag nas rang bzhin gsal ba'i sbub/ rtog med mnyam nyid ngang nas gsal zhes 
501.3(1): so/ /bon sku gsal ba'i sbubs na/ rtog med kyi shes pa nang gsal du gnas so/ /
501.4(1): de ltar rang lus stong gsal du go tsam na/ na ba'i rgyu ma grub/ de la lhas bcos su 
501.5(1): med/ 'dres gdon du med/ bag chags kyis gos su med/ dper na nam mkha' 
501.6(1): stong pa la/ sas brnan du med/ chus sbang du med/ mes bsreg du med/ rlung gis 
501.7(1): gtor du med/ phyi snang stong du shes pas rtog pa'i rten zhig /nang rig stong du shes 
501.8(1): pas nyon mongs kyi rgya ral/snang 'dzin gyi shes pa rang sar grol bas 'dzin med gyi 
501.9(1): ngang du blo bral du go /thugs rig pa ye shes zang thal du go /snang ba ye shes stong pa 
501.10(1): zang thal du go /bon sku zang thal du blos ma bcos ste/ rang 'byung gi ye shes gsal 
501.11(1): la rtog pa med par lam du 'khyer/ de yang spyi rgyud nas/ zla cig bsgom pas nyams 
501.12(1): myong skye/ zla gnyis bsgoms pas mngon zhen bzlog /zla gsum bsgom pas 'khrul pa 
501.13(1): 'jig /sgra bsgrags pa tsam gyis spros zhing gus/ bun long gi dad pa ngang gis skye/
501.14(1): 'dod yon gyi zhen pa rang sar ldog /'khor gsum yang dag spang snying 'dod/
501.15(1): longs spyod tshogs su gtong snying 'dod/ rgyal 'khams phyogs med bskor snying

501.17(1): zhen med kyi nyams myongs rtog pa skye/ rgyal 'khams gnas su 'khyam par 'ong /
501.18(1): don gnyis pa ye shes skyel bsu'i gdam ngag 'pho ba'i lag len la gnyis ste/ 'pho 
501.19(1): ba la sbyang pa dang / lag len kyis spar thabs so/ /de la shes pa snying dkyil du 'od 
501.20(1): tshon pa de la brten de nyams su blang pas/ zag pa med pa 'od gsal gyi nyams 
501.21(1): 'char/ de mngon du gyur te nus pa mthu' can sngon du song pas rtags dang drod 
502.1(1): tshad ni rab 'bring nyams la 'char/ khyad par du 'pho ba la sbyang ste/ 'od la bsdus 
502.2(1): na 'od kyi snying po nyung 'bru tsam bya ba cig yod pa/ de ru rig pa hril le spyi bo nas 
502.3(1): spar/ rang don rten snying gi 'od 'bar ba'i de ltar du byas pas snga ma lta bsgom/
502.4(1): mthun can de sngon du song tsam na phyi ma'i lta bsgom de bya mi dgos ste ngang ngam rang 
502.5(1): bzhin gyis 'byung la/ dper na skyes bu mda' 'phen pa'i dus su/ gzhu' ltong 
502.6(1): 'theb mdzug 'dzoms pas 'phen dgos/ des 'phang na rang bzhin gyis 'gro ba 
502.7(1): 'byung las/ gzhu ltong 'thebs 'dzug sbyar mi dgos pa bzhin/ skye ba 'di nyid la 
502.8(1): nus pa mthu' can yod pa des// bar dor bsgom mi dgos te/ rang bzhin gyi 
502.9(1): gsal te snga ma'i bag chags kyis bskyel/ phyi ma'i 'od gsal gyi bsu ste/ ye shes

502.11(1): sangs rgyas lag changs su thob pa yin no/ /de ltar rgyud la nyams su blang pa gal

502.13(1): bar do ngo shes pa dka' bas/ dran pa rgyun chags su khyer te/ de ltar du shes tsam 
502.14(1): na mi grol kha med/ gsum gyis grol te/ rkyen du 'char ba dang / sun mar 'ong pa 
502.15(1): dang / skyel ma gsum gyis ma pang du bu rgyug pa dang 'dra'o/ /gnyis pa lag len kyi 
502.16(1): spar thabs ni/ lus la 'du ba'i nad dar te/ 'chi ba'i dus su sngar bla mas bstan

502.19(1): sbugs su gzhug /lus dang lag dang sgra dang na/ rig pa rlung gis bskul thabs 
502.20(1): dang / 'od kyi 'khor lo'i spar thabs rnams/ bla ma dam pa'i zhal las shes/ gang 
502.21(1): zag dbang po yang rab kyis/ skar mda' mnga' thim tshul du 'pho/ 'bring gi bla ma 
503.1(1): yi dam gang bde' la 'pho/ tha ma grol nas rgyas par byed/ bar do'i gdam ngag 
503.2(1): bstan par byed pa la don gnyis te/ bar do spyi don gyi dbye ba bzhag pa dang /

503.21(1): dpe' bsgeg mos me long lta ba lta bur nyams su blangs ste/ na chung ma rab 'bring

510.1(1): drug dang / dmyal ba tsha grang gi rjes dran la sogs rigs drug gi sdug bsngal rjes 
510.2(1): su dran te/ sangs rgyas ci la yang mi chags pa'o/ /gnyis pa de la gcung chung pa 
510.3(1): dbang po 'bring gi sangs rgyas lugs la gnyis te/ skyel ma gsum/ bar lung pa 
510.4(1): gsum/ sun ma gsum mo/ /de la skyel ma gsum ni/ dpe' don rtag gsum gyi ngo 
510.5(1): sprod btab ba bzhin lam du 'khyer ba gal che/ ma khyer na dug lnga'i sgra 'ong / gnyis 
510.6(1): pa bar lung gsum ni de ltar la ngo sprad/ 'chi khar gsal gdab/ shi nas 'char 
510.7(1): ba'o/ /gsum pa sun ma gsum ni/ rang snang sun ma dang 'dra ste/ mi 'dod kyang 
510.8(1): rang snang 'od lngar yong / sgra mi 'dod kyang sun mar 'ong / zer mi 'dod kyang sun 
510.9(1): mar 'ong / de la sgra 'od zer gsum byung tsam na/ der ngo sprod mkhan gyi bla ma 
510.10(1): 'dren/ bla ma rkyen du shar/ der gdam ngag rkyen du shar nas/ gsal thebs te/ sa 
510.11(1): sar ngo shes pa lta bu'o/ /de yang lnga po 'di spyi la dgos te/ bla ma la mos pa ma log

511.10(1): dang kha brigs ngo sprod bla ma'i zhal las shes so/ /gnyis grol 'khrul bstan pa la

520.3(1): long ral gri gzugs/ bu mo mtshan ldan gyis bkal pa'i/ tshon sna lnga'i skud pa 
520.4(1): yis/ bum pa gzungs lcag 'dom gsum/ nang du rin chen sman spos chab/ kha 
520.5(1): rgyan 'gul ching gtsang mar sbyar/ mi lpags dar zab bla ri 'phen/ rin chen me 
520.6(1): tog thod 'phrengs bskor/ rus brgyan gling bu thod rnga sogs/ yo byad lnga sogs sprin

520.9(1): btang / phyi 'tshams rgyal chen tho yang gzugs/ ra sogs sgo them dam sri mnan/
520.10(1): khro bcu la sogs 'tshams yang bcad/ phyi nang 'phrin las rgyas par bsrang / mchod

520.15(1): skad brjod la blud/ 'di ni bdud rtsi chen po'i chu/ rtogs pa rnams la rtser 'gyur

520.17(1): dam tshigs chen po'i chu/ dam la gnas pas btung bar bya/ ces blud do/ /'dus 
520.18(1): pa ni dkyil gyi phar rgyab du/ pad ma 'dab bzhi pa re bris la/ de steng khrus la byung 
520.19(1): nas bzhag /bdag gi lus rdul snyed du sprul la/ dus 'di nas bzung nas 'gro

586.6(1): rtsol bral mkha' ltar dag pa'i sku mchog la/ rjes 'jug sngon sbyangs 'phro can gshen 
586.7(1): rab bdag /dad mos drag po'i stobs kyis gsol ba 'debs/ thugs rje bri gang 
586.8(1): med par dgongs mdzod la/ phyogs med bdal khyab dgongs su gsol/
586.9(1): de nas ye shes mkha' 'gro la bstod te/ A+o~M a hUM/ mkha' gsal nyi zla'i 'od 
586.10(1): 'phros ltar/ khyab bdal bon gyi sku las longs spyod rdzogs skur shar/ dbus phyogs 
586.11(1): g.yung drung rigs kyi dkyil 'khor nas/ kun gsal 'byung pa nam mkha'i zhing 
586.12(1): khams nas/ rnam shes phung po yongs su dag pa'i lha/ me long ye shes yongs 'dus 
586.13(1): longs spyod rdzogs/ rjes 'jug bdag gi zhe sdang sgrib sbyang phyir/ dad mos drag po'i 
586.14(1): stobs kyis gsol ba 'debs/ thugs rje bri gang med par dgongs mdzod la/ kun 
586.15(1): gsal me long ye shes dngos grub gsol/ shar phyogs bder gshegs rigs kyi 
586.16(1): dkyil 'khor nas/ kun gzhi' stobs chen sa'i zhing khams nas/ gzugs kyi phung 
586.17(1): po gnas su dag pa'i lha/ stong nyid ye shes yongs 'dus longs spyod rdzogs/ rjes 
586.18(1): 'jug bdag gis gti mug sgrib pa sbyang pa'i phyir/ dad mos drag pos stobs kyis 
586.19(1): gsol ba 'debs/ thugs rje bri gang med par dgongs mdzod la/ bsam 'das 
586.20(1): stong nyid ye shes dngos grub gsol/ lho phyogs rin chen rigs kyi dkyil 'khor nas/
586.21(1): brlan bsil sdud byed chu'i zhing khams nas/ tshor ba'i phung po gnas su dag pa'i 
587.1(1): lha/ mnyam nyid ye shes yongs 'dus longs spyod rdzogs/ rjes 'jug bdag gi nga 
587.2(1): rgyal sgrib pa sbyang ba'i phyir/ dad mos drag po'i stobs kyis gsol ba 'debs/
587.3(1): thugs rje bri gang med par dgongs mdzod la/ kun ldan mnyam nyid ye shes dngos 
587.4(1): grub gsol/ nub phyogs pad+ma rigs kyi dkyil 'khor nas/ smin byed sreg byed me'i 
587.5(1): zhing khams nas/ 'du shes phung po gnas su dag pa'i lha/ kun rtog ye shes yongs 
587.6(1): 'dus longs spyod rdzogs/ rjes 'jug bdag gi 'dod chags sgrib pa sbyang ba'i phyir/
587.7(1): dad mos drag pos stobs kyis gsol ba 'debs/ thugs rje bri gang med par 
587.8(1): dgongs mdzod la/ so so kun rtog ye shes dngos grub gsol/ byang phyogs las kyi

587.10(1): byed phung po gnas su dag pa'i lha/ bya grub ye shes yongs 'dus longs spyod rdzogs/

587.12(1): kyis gsol ba 'debs/ thugs rje bri gang med par dgongs mdzod la/ las rdzogs 
587.13(1): bya grub ye shes dngos grub gsol/ thabs chen yab dang shes rab yab yum sprul/
587.14(1): dbus phyogs dbyings kyi yum chen nam mkha'i bde ldan ma/ shar phyogs dbyings kyi

587.17(1): dbyings kyi yum chen 'deg pa kun sgrol ma/ shes rab yum lnga mkha' 'gro kun gyi 
587.18(1): gtso/ rjes 'jug bdag gi dug lnga phung po lnga/ dbang po lnga sogs ye shes lnga sbyar

587.20(1): dgongs mdzod la/ ye shes rnam lnga rol pa'i dngos grub gsol/ de nas 'jig 
587.21(1): rten pa'i mkha' 'gro ma la bstod pa/ oM a hUM/ ye shes dbyings lnga'i mkha' 'gro

636.9(1): sprod kyi gnad drug dang / lta ba'i gol sa gcod pa rdeng gi gnad bdun ni/ shes

636.11(1): la/ phyis li shu stag ring kyis gshen po'i don du yi ge btabs pa'o/ /phyi rabs las 
636.12(1): 'phro can dang 'phrad nas kyang / skal ldan rnams kyi rgyud la smin par shog /bla ma 
636.13(1): yi dam ye shes mkha' 'gro la phyag 'tshal lo/ /bsgom pas sangs rgya ba gtum mo'i 
636.14(1): gnad 'di la/ gdam pa'i man ngag dril na phyi nang gsang ba gsum/ phyi ltar rten 
636.15(1): 'brel la bstun nas nyams su blang pa dang / nang ltar ting nge 'dzin gyi bcud la 
636.16(1): nyams su blang pa dang / gsang pa ltar drod btsan thabs su dbab pa'o/ /phyi ltar 
636.17(1): sngon 'gro sems bskyed dang / maN+Tal 'bul/ me'i dbang dang byin rlabs bzhu'o/ /
637.1(1): de nas dmigs pa phyi nang gsang pa ltar bsgom/ rten 'brel rdzas bstan par bya'o/ /
637.2(1): drod skyes pa ltar lus kyi gos dbri nyams bskyang ngo / /ye shes mkha' 'gro ma la phyag 
637.3(1): 'tshal lo/ /gtum mo drod kyi ting nge 'dzin gnad kyi gdam pa la/ lus gnad 
637.4(1): dmigs pa bstun par byas ste/ sngon du skyabs 'gro dang sems bskyed bya'o/ /de 
637.5(1): nas stan bde ba la 'dug la/ lus po me'i 'dug stang ces bya ba/ dkyil dkrungs 
637.6(1): la pus mo phyag rgya tsog tsog po 'dug la/ rkang pa'i 'theb chen lag pas bzung 
637.7(1): la/ 'og rlung bsdams/ de'i ngang la rtsa dbu' ma snyugs ma tsam cig spyi bo nas lte 
637.8(1): 'og gnyer ma'i snar zug pa cig sgom/ de yang phyi nang med par gsal ba/ 'od 
637.9(1): kyi rang bzhin du phod pa cig sgom/ gshang khar yaM ljang khu cig bsam/ sum dor 
637.10(1): ram dmar smug cig bsgom/ yaM las ye shes kyi rlung byung / raM las me 'bar ste/ me 
637.11(1): dar skud tsam cig rtsa nang na yar song pas/ lte 'og tsam la/ ngo bo tsha ba/ kha dog 
637.12(1): dmar ba/ rang bzhin gsal ba cig bsgom/ de la thun drug la mang par sbyar bar 
637.13(1): bya/ rtags lus la drod 'byung / rtsa kha bye shes rab 'phel/ rig pa'i dang snyigs 
637.14(1): phyed nas shes pa gsal lo/ /de nas me lce cung yar drangs la lte ba'i gong tsam du 
637.15(1): bzung / dud pa mchin dri man chad na bun bun yod par bsgom/ drod sngar bas 
637.16(1): che na/ cung yar byang khog tsam du me song bar sgom/ dud pa glad pa dung khang tsam 
637.17(1): du 'khyil bar bsgom/ de la thun sngar bas ring pa bzhin gnyis 'gyur du bsring 
637.18(1): ngo / /drod skyes pa bzhin thun je ring la btang ngo / /me yang dar skud pas je che la 
637.19(1): mar me tsam du sgom/ des na bde drod 'phral du 'byung ngo / /byin rlabs dngos grub 
637.20(1): shugs kyi 'byung / da gsum pa thug phrad lam du bslang pa la/ 'jig rten 'di ni 
637.21(1): 'khrul skyen mang / bag chags ngan rtog rjes su 'bring / thar pa'i lam la bsgrod pa 
638.1(1): nyung / de phyir man ngag 'di la 'bad/ ces lha bon khyab pa snang ldan gyi gsungs pa/
638.2(1): de'i man ngag la gsum ste/ phyi gdon la thug phrad lam du bslang pa dang / nang 
638.3(1): nyon mongs lam du bslang pa dang / gsang ba ma rig lam du bslang pa'o/ /
638.4(1): dang po ni bdag la gnod pa'i gdon la 'khrul pa yin pas kho thag bcad/bon 
638.5(1): nyid sems yin log nas 'char rgyu med/ yod med sems la yang yang lta/ ltas 
638.6(1): pas yul med stong par grol/ gdon 'dre ma rtogs 'khrul pa dag la byung / ces 
638.7(1): gsungs pas/ sems nyid kyi rang bzhin brtags/ stong nyid kyi go bsgo gdon 
638.8(1): rang sems su thag bcad/ 'dzin pa'i yul phud dngos med du gsal la rjen par 
638.9(1): bzhag go /stong nyid la 'khrul klag mi snyed do/ /de la rig pa mi gnas par 'khrul 
638.10(1): pas byung na thog rdzis lam du bslangs ste/ phung po khams dang skye mched rnams/
638.11(1): dwangs ma yi dam la mchod pa 'bul/ bar gyi sha khrag mkha' 'gro la tshogs su 'bul/
638.12(1): rtsig dang khu ba lha srin sde brgyad rigs drug kun la sbyin par gtang / sems nyid 
638.13(1): ma bcos ngang la bzhag /lus la gces 'dzin med par bzhag /thams cad myes 
638.14(1): dang dgyes par tshim par bsam/ de rjes stong nyid mi rtog ngang la sang / yang yang 
638.15(1): dran pas rtsis yis byug /bar chod gdon kun rang zhir gyur/ yang na bdag lus 
638.16(1): sha khrag bcas pa 'di/ rin po che'i mchod rten chen po cig du bsam/ bdag gi rig 
638.17(1): pa byan byed phyag tshang mdzes par bsam/ mgron du gyur tshad gral du bsgrig par 
638.18(1): bsam/ de la bdag gi mgron rigs bzhi la yang / mchod dang rgyas dang sbyin pa ni/

638.20(1): ba bsam/ yang yang chag sems med par sbyin par btang / rig pa stong gsal 
638.21(1): ngang la bzhag go /de yang lung las/ 'di ni gsang pa'i tshogs 'khor ste/ bder 
639.1(1): gshegs myes shing mkha' 'gro dgyes/ sde brgyad sbyin pas tshim pa dang / rigs 
639.2(1): drug lan chags kher bar 'gyur/ tshe cig lus cig sdig sgrib 'dag /mchog thob 
639.3(1): g.yung drung sku ru 'gyur/ ces gsungs so/ /de phyir 'di lta 'bad cing sbyin tshogs 
639.4(1): gtang / bar chod gdon kun rang zhir 'gyur ro/ /nyon mongs lam du bslang pa la 
639.5(1): gnyis ste/ nad dang nyon mongs pa'o/ /nad rlung 'khris 'dus pa bad kan gsum 
639.6(1): la yang / bdag gi spyi gtsug du kun tu bzang po sgom/ de'i thugs ka nas ye shes 
639.7(1): kyi chu rgyun bab nas/ bdag gi spyi bo nas zhugs nas/ ba spu'i bu ga kun nas nad 
639.8(1): kyi ngo bo thams cad sngo dmar du si li li phyir thon par bsam/ tshad nad la chu de'i

639.10(1): do/ /nyon mongs pa las/ nyon mongs pa gang skye ba la ngo bo dang rang bzhin brtags/
639.11(1): dngos med rang grol 'dzin med du bzhag go /yang na bdag gi spyi gtsug du ye shes

639.13(1): pas/ rtsa dbu' ma la song pas lus kyi rtsa thams cad gang ste/ nyon mongs pa thams

639.15(1): la nyon mongs pa gang shar ba de la brtag gzhig btang / sems men gyi nyams myong

639.17(1): nyon mongs pa ma zhi sems skrugs sems/ snying mi dga' na/ bdag gi mdun du

639.21(1): thim par bsam/ de nas bdag gi snying nang du nyi zla'i steng du a de dbab ste gsal 
640.1(1): bar sgom/ a la rig pa gtad la rlung nang du brngub cing thub tshad du bzung / de'i 
640.2(1): rjes la nyams dga' ya la la/ shes pa spro sing sing pa sgom/ nyon mongs pa zhi zhing 
640.3(1): snying rlung thams cad zhi bar 'gyur ro/ /gal te des nyon mongs pa 'khrug cing snying 
640.4(1): mi dga' na/ bar chad gdon yin pas thog rdzis kyi dmigs pa 'di ltar bya/ lus

640.21(1): blang / ces lha bon khyab pa snang ldan gyi rgya gar bon gyi bka' lung las/ man ngag

645.15(1): pa lta bur 'gugs/ mig ri dwags e na ya ltar sna rtser phab/ dpung pa rgod gshog

645.18(1): bzhi nas me'i sa bon ram dmar nag spu shad tsam mam mo khab 'bring po tsam 
645.19(1): mdog dmar ba/ ngo bo tsha ba rang bzhin gsal ba cig las me mo khab tsam de lta bu

645.21(1): nyid lnga dang ldan pa cig sgom/ bde' cha ye shes skye ba'i gnad ni/ rlung lam du 
646.1(1): 'jug pa yin te/ rngub pa dang / dgang pa/ gzhil ba/ mda' ltar 'phang pa/
646.2(1): bsdus cing tshe bsring pa dang lnga'o/ /dang po rtsa gsal gdabs pa dang sbyar pa'o/ /
646.3(1): rtsa gsal gdab pa ni/ sbom 'phra dro sogs 'bring po tsam phyi nang med par gsal ba/
646.4(1): nang stong sang nge bsam de yang g.yas g.yon gyi rtse mo sna sgo na yod pa/ rtsa sna gnyis

676.10(1): pa gnyis/ mngal skyes gtso cher bstan pa dang / brdzus skyes gtsor chen bstan pa 
676.11(1): gnyis/ brdzus skyes kyis dbang du byas na/ nub phyogs bde ba can gyi zhing khams/
676.12(1): pad ma rgyas pa'i gling zhes bya ba ru/ me tog pad ma'i sdong po/ kha dog stong dang 
676.13(1): ldan pa/ ro stong dang ldan pa/ dri stong dang ldan pa cig la brdzus nas skyes te/ de 
676.14(1): yang me tog ud dpal sngon po cig la rang 'khrungs su brdzus nas skyes par bzhed 
676.15(1): la yang yod/ da res 'dir ni mngal skyes gtso che ba'i lo rgyus so/ /yab dmu rje 
676.16(1): btsan pa ngar gyi rje dang rgya za na srung 'od ma skar zhes kyang bya/ dmu gshen dag pa 
676.17(1): dang / yum brda za mkhar lcam gnyis kyi rgya za'i sras su bltams/ yang zhan dang 
676.18(1): mi 'dra ba'i khyad par gsum yod do/ /ma'i lto na byas pa'i dus na yig ge a dang hU~M 
676.19(1): gi sgra sgrog pa dang / btsas pa'i dus na gnod sbyin kyi rgyal po dreg pa can seng ge'i 
676.20(1): gdong la sogs pa mi ma yin thams cad phyag dang skor ba byed pa dang / thugs 
676.21(1): rjes dang gong na gser gyi pad ma 'dab brgyad gsal ba'o/ /dgung lo lnga lon
677.1(1): dad pa'i sems dang ldan/ snyon ma 'gro rgyun ma la re 'gan sbag nas byin/ drang 
677.2(1): srong dga' rgyal la sems bskyed dang sdom pa nos/ lo dgu bzhes nas bris dang 
677.3(1): klog gnyis tshad du phyin/ dgung lo bcu bdun bzhes nas rgya gar yul du byon/ rgya 
677.4(1): gar kyi mkhas pa gshen bde ba snying po gsal la/ lo tsha'i tshig la sbyangs shing gsang 
677.5(1): sngags dang sems phyogs/ yang sgos rgya gar gyi bon skor ye phyi mo'i bon sde ma lus 
677.6(1): par bslabs/ skor lnga yod kyang rgya gar bon skor zab/ de la phyi skor dang nang skor 
677.7(1): dang gsang skor gsum/ gsang ba bla na med pa zhes bya ba/ snyan rgyud rnam pa gnyis 
677.8(1): ni gsang ba bla na med pa'i bon skor yin/ de yang rig pa rang grol du gtan la 
677.9(1): 'bebs par byed pa snyan brgyud rin po che nam mkha' 'phrul gyi mdzod chen/ gus 
677.10(1): 'jug khyad par can rgyud la skye zhing 'khor ba las bzlog par byed pa drang don sgron 
677.11(1): ma mun sel/ de ltar phyi dbang / nang dbang / gsang dbang / gsang ba bla na 
677.12(1): med pa'i dbang rnams nas/ gshen ma d+ha b+hi sha la rgyu mtshan nyid kyi bon sde bslab/
677.13(1): zhang zhung stong rgyung mthu chen la mthu dang rdzu 'phrul gyi bon sde zhus/ 'od 'phro seng

677.16(1): bcud len dang rkang mgyog la sogs ste grub rtags shin du mang por phyung / dgung 
677.17(1): lo bzhi bcu zhe bdun la gser phye bre gsum khyer nas bla ma rnams la nyams rtogs 
677.18(1): 'bul du byon/ bde ba g.yung drung lhun po tshal du bla ma rnams spyan drangs nas/
677.19(1): gser gyi ma 'dal phul nas rtogs pa 'phra ba bcad/ tshe'i dngos grub brnyes nas 
677.20(1): bod du lo bdun bzhugs so/ /de tshe bon nub/ chos dar bon rnams gter du sbas/
677.21(1): rdzu 'phrul stobs ldan gshen la dar nub med/ ba gor bai ro tsa nas bon rnams chos 
678.1(1): su bsgyur/ de nas zhang zhung stong rgyung mthu chen drong pa'i mod la lan cig snyags/
678.2(1): de'i dus su mu stegs kyis sde rigs kyis nang pa la spyod ba byed pa'i dus/ tshogs

678.4(1): nus pa thon pa cig gis/ nyin mo gnam gyi nyi ma gza'i kha ru gtad/ dran pa nam 
678.5(1): mkhas/ rdzu 'phrul stobs kyis mkha' la phyin nas gza' rgod ltod la mnan/ nyi ma 
678.6(1): mtha' la phyungs nas sems bde la bkod/ kho'i klu'i grong khyer dkrugs nas kha char 
678.7(1): nyin mtshan med par phab/ bla chen dran pas klu'i rgyal 'khams g.yos nas gnam

678.10(1): gnyid du btang / kho'i nang par dngos grub brtsod pa bgal bas nang pa pham/ rgyu 
678.11(1): brtsal 'gran pas kho'i stobs mthub/ dran pa nam mkha'i bod phrug gzhag par sdod 
678.12(1): pa cig /ming yang bod kyi mon phrug ston mthar btags/ khong na re/ nang par lho 
678.13(1): nub srin po'i dmag gis sa gzhi'i khongs nas byung / khong na re/ nang pas bzlog

678.15(1): dang nus pas bzlog dag zer/ la las rig byed nus mthu sna tshogs kyis bzlog kyang

678.17(1): dag ni 'di yi yang bsrid zer/ la la dag rgya gad sna tshogs sgrod/ bod bon mon 
678.18(1): phrug des nga yis bzlog byas bsam/ khyed kyis bzlog na bstan pa dar bar 'gyur/

678.21(1): par yong zhes sgrogs shing bltas pas/ mtha'i bon phrug khyer te byung / kho pas gad 
679.1(1): mos btab nas kho'i ston pa byung ngo zhes zer/ de la tshig bshad brtsams nas ngag

679.7(1): pa byon no zer/ la la na re khye'u chung kun rga shes rab byon no zer/ ci zer nyan pas

679.20(1): dag pa rnams kyis bltas pas/ rin po che sna bzhi la grub pa'i steng chen po phyogs 
679.21(1): bzhi na gyad chen po bzhi/ zur bzhi nas seng ge chen po bzhis btegs pa/ dpag

685.15(1): bslabs/ bcu gnyis nas nyi shu'i bar du shab du slob dpon zhang ston gi drung du
